title: Numerical simulations of the spread from the mean of the SLE and Multiple SLE dynamics
comment: Note that an updated version of this paper is officially published in the Journal Research in Statistics (2026 Vol 4 Issue 1) that has more updated experiments and discussions. That version is also open access under the Creative Commons Attribution License. It is availabe at https://doi.org/10.1080/27684520.2026.2648957
summary: The Schramm-Loewner Evolution (SLE) describes a family of fractal curves that arise in the study of the scaling limits of many planar Statistical Physics models. These curves are modeled using the Loewner Differential Equation for the conformal maps $g_t(z)$ with a Brownian motion driver. Using Euler's Method, in the current work we performed numerical experiments to study at a fixed time the quantities $|g_t(z) - \overline{g_t(z)}|$ and $Re(g_t(z)) - Re(\overline{g_t(z)})$, where $Re$ denotes the real part and $\overline{g_t(z)}$ refers to the sample average. These random variables measure the 'spread' of the dynamics from the average behavior at fixed time. One of the scopes of this work is to give numerical predictions for future theoretical investigations on these quantities. When investigating these quantities in the SLE case our experiments predict that the distribution is bimodal when the dynamics started close to the origin, and it can become bell-shaped if the dynamics is started further from the origin. In the second part, we performed experiments for a Multiple SLE model whose driver is Dyson Brownian Motion. Due to singularity in the dynamics of the drivers and the many data points needed, this part is challenging from a computational perspective. In the multiple SLE case, our experiments predict that the distribution is bell-shaped in all cases. In addition, we check the changes in the distributions as we vary the parameter $κ$ in the SLE case and $β$ in the Multiple SLE case.

AI.tldr: 本文通过数值实验研究了SLE和多重SLE模型中固定时间下的动力学扩散量，发现了单峰与双峰分布模式，并探讨了参数变化对分布的影响。
AI.motivation: 为未来关于SLE动力学扩散量的理论研究提供数值预测，填补该方向的理论空白。
AI.method: 采用欧拉方法对Loewner微分方程进行数值求解，计算固定时刻下|g_t(z) - 样本均值|及Re(g_t(z)) - Re(样本均值)等扩散量；对多重SLE模型则使用Dyson布朗运动作为驱动，处理计算挑战。
AI.result: SLE情形下，起始点靠近原点时分布呈双峰，远离原点时呈钟形分布；多重SLE情形下所有情况均呈钟形分布。参数κ和β的变化会影响分布形态。
AI.conclusion: 数值实验揭示了SLE与多重SLE在动力学扩散量分布上的差异，为后续理论研究提供了有价值的数值预测。

title: Compressed minimum-purity time evolution for late-time quantum dynamics
summary: Unitary time evolution of initially simple quantum many-body states rapidly generates entanglement and complex correlations, which limits direct numerical simulations. The late-time dynamics of physical observables, however, typically exhibits an effective simplicity in the form of hydrodynamics or kinetic theory. This leads to the question whether microscopic equations of motion can remain accurate and tractable up to long time scales by discarding irrelevant information in a controlled manner. Here, we introduce compressed minimum-purity time evolution (CoMPuTE) as an approach to keep track of a consistent set of reduced local density matrices, closing the hierarchical equations of motion using a minimum-purity principle. In benchmark applications we demonstrate (i) accurate description of energy diffusion in the one-dimensional mixed-field Ising model, (ii) the applicability to genuinely out-of-equilibrium Floquet dynamics starting from a pure state, and (iii) the limitations of the local reduced density matrix approximation when describing transport in the XXZ chain at $Δ=1$ that is governed by increasingly non-local integrals of motion. The CoMPuTE method enhances computational efficiency in comparison to the closely related local-information time evolution algorithm, opening a possible route towards an extension to systems in higher spatial dimensions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CoMPuTE方法，通过最小纯度原则截断局部约化密度矩阵的层次运动方程，在保持准确性的同时大幅提升计算效率，适用于量子多体系统的长时间演化模拟，并指出了其在XXZ链中的局限性。
AI.motivation: 量子多体系统的幺正时间演化会迅速产生复杂纠缠，限制直接数值模拟。然而物理可观测量在长时间尺度下呈现流体动力学或动理学理论的有效简单性，由此引发问题：能否通过可控方式丢弃无关信息，使微观运动方程在长时间尺度下保持准确和可处理。
AI.method: 提出压缩最小纯度时间演化（CoMPuTE）方法，追踪一组自洽的局部约化密度矩阵，并利用最小纯度原则截断运动方程的层级结构。
AI.result: 在基准应用中展示了：(i) 一维混合场Ising模型中能量扩散的准确描述；(ii) 适用于从纯态出发的非平衡Floquet动力学；(iii) 指出了在描述XXZ链（Δ=1）中的输运时，局部约化密度矩阵近似的局限性，该体系由日益非局域的积分运动主导。
AI.conclusion: CoMPuTE方法相比局部信息时间演化算法显著提升了计算效率，为扩展到高维系统开辟了可能路径。

title: A stochastic model for elastoplastic contact of rough surfaces incorporating scale-dependent hardness
summary: The stress concentrations caused by inherent roughness of natural and manufactured surfaces often induce plastic deformation at contact interfaces, a challenge compounded by competing influences of the size effect of plastic deformation and self-affine rough surface topography. To address this, we developed a novel methodology based on stochastic theory using compounded Chapman-Kolmogorov equations, for the first time, to solve elastoplastic contact problems involving scale-dependent hardness. Our approach formulates three integral equations describing the evolution of probability density functions of elastic contact pressure, relative plastic contact area, and relative non-contact area across geometrical scales. We thoroughly investigate the effects of scale-dependent hardness on contact pressure distribution, relative elastic and plastic contact areas, and the area-to-load relationship. By adjusting various mechanical and material properties, our model predicts a smooth transition from linear elasticity to elastic-plastic behavior and finally to full plasticity. A key advancement is the derivation of a new topographic yield parameter incorporating a wider range of material and geometrical properties, aiding identification of contact status. Numerical solutions enable highly precise determination of elastic and plastic limits via curve-fitting, and we also provide a new diagram for rapid identification of contact status. This study pioneers a stochastic process framework for applying the compounded Chapman-Kolmogorov equation to rough surface contact analysis, and the integral equations characterizing how interfacial properties evolve with scale could offer valuable insights for other multidisciplinary fields where multiscale roughness is critical, such as earthquakes, electrical contact, and contact electrification.

AI.tldr: 本文首次基于复合Chapman-Kolmogorov方程构建了随机过程框架，用于求解含尺度依赖硬度的弹塑性粗糙表面接触问题，提出了新的地形屈服参数，并实现了从线弹性到全塑性的平滑过渡预测。
AI.motivation: 天然和加工表面的粗糙度引起的应力集中常导致接触界面发生塑性变形，而塑性变形的尺寸效应与自仿射粗糙表面形貌之间存在相互竞争的影响，现有方法难以有效处理这一问题。
AI.method: 基于随机理论，首次利用复合Chapman-Kolmogorov方程建立了三个积分方程，分别描述弹性接触压力、相对塑性接触面积和相对非接触面积的概率密度函数随几何尺度的演化。
AI.result: 模型能够预测从线弹性到弹塑性再到完全塑性的平滑过渡；推导了新的地形屈服参数；通过曲线拟合可高精度确定弹性和塑性极限；提供了快速识别接触状态的新图表。
AI.conclusion: 本研究开创了将复合Chapman-Kolmogorov方程应用于粗糙表面接触分析的随机过程框架，所建立的积分方程可推广至其他涉及多尺度粗糙度的跨学科领域，如地震学、电接触和接触起电等。

title: Universal Information-Theoretic Structure of the Quasi-Stationary Domany--Kinzel Automaton
summary: We characterize the quasi-stationary distribution (QSD) of the bond directed-percolation line of the Domany--Kinzel automaton using a matrix-product-state representation of the probability distribution, obtained by projecting out the absorbing state and iterating the transfer matrix. Unlike moment- or sampling-based methods, this yields the full conditional distribution and direct access to information-theoretic diagnostics. The spatial structure of the QSD changes sharply across the transition: the active phase is bulk-like with finite density, whereas in the inactive phase the surviving activity collapses into a single flock occupying a vanishing fraction of the chain, with an internal filling that ranges from a single cluster deep in the inactive phase to a loose, partially filled group near criticality. This picture carries a sharp information-theoretic signature: throughout the inactive phase the bipartite mutual information of the QSD equals the entropy of a single binary choice -- whether the flock lies to the left or right of the cut -- so the surviving clusters together encode just one bit of positional information, corresponding to a single effective cluster. The approach extends matrix-product-state techniques to the projected eigenvector defining a QSD, opening information-theoretic diagnostics for absorbing-state systems that bulk-observable methods cannot reach.

AI.tldr: 本文使用矩阵乘积态表示方法研究Domany–Kinzel自动机中键定向渗流线的拟平稳分布，揭示了活跃与非活跃相变的空间结构及信息论特征：非活跃相中存活活动凝聚为一个有效簇，其互信息仅编码1比特位置信息。
AI.motivation: 传统基于矩或采样的方法无法获得完整的条件分布，也难以进行信息论诊断。本文旨在通过矩阵乘积态方法获取QSD的完整分布，从而深入理解相变结构的空间和信息论特征。
AI.method: 通过投影掉吸收态并迭代转移矩阵，利用矩阵乘积态表示来表征Domany–Kinzel自动机的拟平稳分布，从而得到完整的条件分布。
AI.result: 活跃相表现为体态有限密度；非活跃相中存活活动凝聚为单个"群"，占据链的极小部分，其内部填充从单个团簇（深非活跃相）到松散部分填充（近临界）不等。整个非活跃相中，二分互信息等于单二进制选择的熵（1比特位置信息）。
AI.conclusion: 矩阵乘积态方法可有效扩展到投影本征向量定义的QSD，为传统体观测量方法无法触及的吸收态系统开辟了信息论诊断的新途径。

title: My Chemical Harness: Evolutionary Molecular Design over Synthetic Pathways with Large Language Model Agents
summary: Designing molecules with target properties is most useful when candidate structures are accompanied by feasible synthetic routes. We introduce My Chemical Harness, a route-native evolutionary framework for goal-directed molecular design in which the search population consists of executable synthetic pathways rather than isolated molecular graphs. Each route is built from purchasable building blocks and reaction templates, executed by deterministic chemistry tools, and scored through task-specific molecular oracles. Large language models (LLMs) are used only as strategy controllers that select high-level preferences over route length, move type, reaction families, motifs, and exploration pressure, while local code performs route construction, validation, deduplication, scoring, selection, and memory updates. This separation lets the LLM guide exploration without allowing it to introduce hallucinated products or unsupported reaction steps. On a soluble epoxide hydrolase proxy task, our LLM agent improves over single pass LLM and deterministic controllers, reaching state-of-the-art performance across the sEH score, synthetic accessibility score, and AiZynthFinder success rate metrics. These results suggest that constrained LLM agents can play a significant role in molecular discovery without requiring training, fine-tuning, or dedicated generative models.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为My Chemical Harness的路线原生进化框架，使用可执行合成路径而非分子图进行目标导向分子设计，结合LLM作为策略控制器和确定性化学工具，在sEH代理任务上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 分子设计需要同时考虑目标性质和可行的合成路线，现有方法大多只优化分子结构而忽视合成可行性，导致候选分子难以实际合成。
AI.method: 构建基于合成路径的进化搜索框架，路径由可购买砌块和反应模板构建，LLM仅作为策略控制器选择高级偏好（路线长度、反应类型等），局部代码执行路径构建、验证、去重、评分等确定性操作。
AI.result: 在可溶性环氧化物水解酶代理任务上，该方法在sEH分数、合成可及性分数和AiZynthFinder成功率指标上均达到SOTA水平。
AI.conclusion: 受约束的LLM代理无需训练或微调即可在分子发现中发挥重要作用，LLM与确定性工具的分离有效避免了幻觉产物和不可行反应步骤。

title: Chiral anomaly and planar Hall conductance in pseudospin-$1$ Fermions
summary: Positive longitudinal magnetoconductance (LMC) and planar Hall conductance (PHC) are hallmark transport signatures of the chiral anomaly in Weyl semimetals. Recent theoretical developments have extended Weyl fermions to multifold Fermionic systems with higher-pseudospin quasiparticle excitations, motivating the study of their magnetotransport properties. Here, we employ semiclassical Boltzmann transport theory within the relaxation-time approximation to investigate magnetotransport in pseudospin-1 Weyl semimetals, incorporating momentum-dependent scattering, orbital magnetic moment corrections, and charge-conservation constraints. To obtain a finite PHC, we break azimuthal symmetry through either a generic tilt of the quasiparticle dispersion or a finite misalignment between the electric and magnetic fields. In the untilted case, the PHC is positive and scales quadratically with magnetic field strength. Increasing the scattering strength induces a sign reversal of the PHC, producing a transition from positive to negative values. The PHC further exhibits the characteristic angular dependence $\sin 2γ$, where $γ$ is the angle between the magnetic field and the $x$-axis. Tilt qualitatively alters this behavior: tilt along the $x$- and $z$-directions changes the angular response to $\sinγ$ and $\cosγ$, respectively, generating strong anisotropy in the planar Hall signal. Moreover, the PHC shows a nonmonotonic dependence on tilt magnitude, revealing the interplay between tilt-induced symmetry breaking and chiral-anomaly-driven transport. Our results provide experimentally accessible signatures of multifold fermions and a framework for interpreting magnetotransport measurements in candidate materials of space groups 199, 214, and 220.

AI.tldr: 本文通过半经典玻尔兹曼输运理论，系统研究了赝自旋-1外尔半金属中的纵向磁导和平面霍尔电导，揭示了散射强度、倾斜方向和磁场角度对输运行为的影响，为多折叠费米子材料提供了可实验检验的输运特征。
AI.motivation: 最近理论发展将外尔费米子推广到具有更高赝自旋准粒子激发的高折叠费米子体系，这激发了对它们磁输运性质的研究需求。本文旨在理解这类体系中手征反常相关的磁输运行为。
AI.method: 采用弛豫时间近似下的半经典玻尔兹曼输运理论，结合动量依赖散射、轨道磁矩修正和电荷守恒约束，通过打破方位对称性（引入准粒子色散倾斜或电场-磁场错位）来研究赝自旋-1外尔半金属的磁输运。
AI.result: 无倾斜时平面霍尔电导为正且与磁场平方成正比；增强散射强度会导致其从正值反转为负值；平面霍尔电导呈现 sin2γ 角度依赖；倾斜沿x和z方向分别使角度依赖变为 sinγ 和 cosγ，产生强各向异性；平面霍尔电导对倾斜幅度呈非单调依赖。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为多折叠费米子提供了可实验检验的输运特征，为解释空间群199、214和220候选材料中的磁输运测量提供了理论框架。

title: Superconductivity near quarter- and half-filling of a strongly correlated triangular Hubbard band in twisted trilayer WSe2
summary: The triangular-lattice Hubbard model is one of the paradigmatic settings for studying correlated electronic systems with geometric frustration that can give rise to a variety of phases. Recently, twisted bilayer TMD systems have emerged as attractive experimental platforms for realising such a model in the moderate-correlation regime. Alternating twisted trilayer TMD systems are expected to realise stronger correlations than bilayer systems owing to their mirror symmetry. Here we report the discovery of superconductivity near quarter- and half-filling, together with various correlated phases, in alternating twisted trilayer WSe2 (TTWSe2). At half filling, a robust correlated insulating state persists over a broad range of displacement fields, signalling the strongly correlated regime. Upon doping, superconductivity emerges over an extended region of the phase diagram. Near quarter filling, another superconducting state appears flanked by correlated metals. Our results establish the TTWSe2 system as a compelling platform for studying strongly correlated triangular-lattice Hubbard physics.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了在交替扭曲三层WSe2（TTWSe2）中靠近四分之一填充和半填充处发现超导现象，以及多种关联相，证实了该系统是研究强关联三角晶格Hubbard物理的优越平台。
AI.motivation: 三角晶格Hubbard模型是研究几何阻挫关联电子系统的经典模型，而扭曲双层TMD体系已在中等关联区域实现了这一模型。为了研究更强关联的区域，作者关注具有镜像对称性的交替扭曲三层TMD系统。
AI.method: 实验上制备了交替扭曲三层WSe2（TTWSe2）器件，通过调控载流子浓度（填充因子）和位移场，系统测量其输运性质。
AI.result: 在半填充处观察到鲁棒的关联绝缘态，在宽位移场范围内稳定存在；在此态掺杂后出现超导；在近四分之一填充处发现另一个超导态，两侧伴随关联金属相。
AI.conclusion: TTWSe2系统是研究强关联三角晶格Hubbard物理的极具吸引力的实验平台。

title: Reconfigurable Strain Gradient Polarity in Crystalline Oxide Nanomembranes for Controlled Bending of Functional Materials
summary: We report the fabrication and mechanical characterization of a "bubble" geometry for accessing local strain gradients using freestanding, single-crystalline manganite nanomembranes: a switchable bistable nanodrum, with opposite strain gradient polarities. By leveraging epitaxial strain as a source of pre-strain and with control of geometrical and mechanical boundary conditions, the fabricated device can support strain gradients with strain variation ranging from 0.01% to 1%. Switching energetics can be designed to configure the bubble morphology. By providing a mechanical framework for sustained strain gradients, this platform supports scalable oxide membrane applications such as the mechanical manipulation of magnetism, coupled to local probes.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了基于单晶锰氧化物纳米膜的可切换双稳态纳米鼓结构，通过应变梯度调控实现0.01%至1%的应变变化，为氧化物膜在磁性调控等应用中提供了可扩展的机械平台。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以在局部区域实现可控且持久的应变梯度，本文旨在通过几何和力学边界条件的设计，利用外延应变作为预应变源，构建可切换双稳态的纳米鼓结构，以实现对局部应变梯度的灵活调控。
AI.method: 采用单晶锰氧化物纳米膜制备了自由支撑的"气泡"几何结构，利用外延应变作为预应变源，通过控制几何与力学边界条件，构建了具有相反应变梯度极性的可切换双稳态纳米鼓。
AI.result: 该器件可支持0.01%至1%的应变变化范围，且通过设计开关能量学可配置气泡形貌，实现了应变梯度极性的可切换控制。
AI.conclusion: 该平台为维持持久的应变梯度提供了力学框架，可扩展至氧化物膜应用，如结合局部探针实现对磁性的力学操控。

title: Introducing an Extensible Open-Source Toolkit Suite for Studying Second Harmonic Generation: A Case Study of Depleted Pulsed Gaussian Wave SHG
summary:
Second Harmonic Generation (SHG) in nonlinear crystals has been extensively investigated, but most existing models still rely on simplifying assumptions. In realistic settings, thermal effects introduce complications that are difficult to capture analytically because the governing equations are highly coupled and nonlinear. Direct experimental characterization is also limited, since studying thermal effects would require spatiotemporal temperature data at every point in the crystal, which is not experimentally accessible.
  To address these limitations, we have developed a SHG Computational Toolkit Suite, a coordinated collection of independent modeling toolkits that cover different SHG scenarios under various physical conditions. Each toolkit focuses on a particular configuration or coupling mechanism, while the suite as a whole provides well-documented numerical implementations, reproducible workflows, and illustrative examples.
  Together, this article and the Toolkit Suite provide a coherent infrastructure for computational studies of SHG. It enables researchers to replicate, adapt, and extend our methods without duplicating foundational development efforts, thereby accelerating SHG research and promoting reproducibility.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个用于二次谐波生成（SHG）研究的计算工具包套件，该套件包含多个独立建模工具包，覆盖不同物理条件下的SHG场景，提供数值实现、可复现工作流和示例，旨在加速SHG研究并提高可复现性。
AI.motivation: 现有SHG模型依赖简化假设，难以处理实际中热效应带来的复杂耦合非线性问题；实验表征也受限于无法获取晶体内部时空温度数据。因此需要一种计算工具来弥补这一空白。
AI.method: 开发了一个SHG Computational Toolkit Suite，包含一组协同工作的独立建模工具包，每个工具包针对特定配置或耦合机制，并提供完善的文档、可复现的工作流和示例。
AI.result: 形成了一套完整的基础设施，涵盖多种SHG场景下的数值实现方法。
AI.conclusion: 该工具包套件使研究人员无需重复基础开发工作即可复现、调整和扩展方法，从而加速SHG研究并促进可复现性。

title: Exact Dynamics of Topological Order Across a CDW--SPT Transition
summary: We investigate the nonequilibrium dynamics of a one-dimensional interacting system across a transition from a charge-density-wave (CDW) phase to a symmetry-protected topological (SPT) phase. Starting from a CDW initial state, we study both sudden quenches and slow ramps into the SPT regime. While the CDW order melts under both protocols, the fate of topological order is sharply different. Following a sudden quench, long-range SPT order does not emerge because the post-quench state contains a finite density of excitations above the topological ground state. In contrast, slow ramps allow the system to follow the instantaneous ground state away from the critical region, enabling the buildup of SPT order with deviations governed by Kibble-Zurek defect production. The dynamics is solvable via a unitary mapping to a quadratic fermionic Hamiltonian, allowing us to compute the Loschmidt echo, correlation functions, and string correlator. The Loschmidt rate function exhibits cusps signaling dynamical quantum phase transitions, while the correlation dynamics reveal the contrasting mechanisms governing quenches and ramps across the transition. These results demonstrate that entering the topological regime is not sufficient for the emergence of topological order; the decisive factor is the suppression of excitation production during the evolution.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了通过突然淬火和慢速斜坡两种协议从电荷密度波相进入对称保护拓扑相的非平衡动力学。结果表明，突然淬火无法建立长程拓扑序，而慢速斜坡可以，关键在于抑制激发产生。
AI.motivation: 探究一维相互作用系统从CDW相到SPT相转变过程中的非平衡动力学，特别是不同驱动协议下拓扑序能否建立的问题。
AI.method: 通过幺正映射到二次费米子哈密顿量，研究突然淬火和慢速斜坡两种协议，计算Loschmidt回波、关联函数和弦关联函数。
AI.result: 突然淬火后，拓扑基态之上存在有限密度激发，无法建立长程SPT序；慢速斜坡能使系统跟随瞬时基态，SPT序的建立受Kibble-Zurek缺陷产生控制。Loschmidt率函数出现尖峰，标志动力学量子相变。
AI.conclusion: 进入拓扑区域并不足以建立拓扑序，关键在于演化过程中抑制激发产生。

title: Estimation of conserved charges for a one dimensional system with inhomogeneous hopping
summary: Quantum integrability in a system is characterized by a large number of conserved charges. However, finding the conserved charges in a generic quantum system is highly challenging. The integrable matrix theory provides a unified framework to obtain the conserved charges in a certain class of systems. We demonstrate this framework in case of a single-particle system on a 1D finite-sized lattice with inhomogeneous nearest neighbor hopping to study the statistical properties of the system across its chaotic--integrable crossover from the perspective of the conserved charges. The eigenspectrum of our random matrix model is studied first. We then estimate the conserved charges and find their properties throughout the chaotic to integrable transition of the system. We calculate the number of conserved charges across this crossover and observe that it is nearly equal to the size of the system at its integrable limit. Our result suggests that the number of conserved charges, estimated using the integrable matrix theory, can be a measure of quantum integrability.

AI.tldr: 本文利用可积矩阵理论，在一维非均匀跳跃晶格单粒子系统中，通过计算守恒荷的数量及其在混沌-可积转变中的变化，提出守恒荷的数量可作为量子可积性的度量指标。
AI.motivation: 量子可积系统的核心特征是具有大量守恒荷，但在一般量子系统中找到这些守恒荷极具挑战。本文旨在利用可积矩阵理论这一统一框架，通过研究守恒荷在混沌-可积转变中的统计特性，探索守恒荷数量是否可以作为衡量量子可积性的标准。
AI.method: 本文采用可积矩阵理论框架，研究对象为一维有限尺寸晶格上的单粒子系统，具有非均匀最近邻跳跃。首先研究随机矩阵模型的本征谱，然后估计并分析守恒荷从混沌到可积转变过程中的性质。
AI.result: 计算了混沌-可积转变过程中守恒荷的数量，发现在可积极限下，守恒荷数量几乎等于系统尺寸。这一结果表明守恒荷数量可作为量子可积性的度量。
AI.conclusion: 通过可积矩阵理论估计的守恒荷数量，可以作为量子可积性的一种有效度量指标。

title: Elucidating the Size of Chemical Space with Assembly Theory
summary: Chemical space is unimaginably vast with common heuristic estimates suggesting that there are ca. 10^60 'drug-like' molecules possible below a molecular mass of 500 Da. However, these estimates largely ignore the structural and synthetic complexity of the molecules enumerated. Here we present a first-principles estimate of the size of chemical space using the Assembly Theory, which quantifies the amount of causation required to form a molecule, captured in the assembly Index. This is a measurable molecular complexity measure derived from the minimum number of recursive bond-joining operations required to construct a molecular graph. Assembly Theory partitions chemical space into levels defined by Assembly Index, allowing bounds to be placed on its growth as molecular complexity increases. We show that chemical space (the accumulated Assembly Index level sets) grows at least super-exponentially, and at most, double-exponentially with respect to the Assembly Index. Using the GDB-13 database as a reference for growth-rate estimation, we model how chemical space expands under increasing complexity and contracts under structural constraints, including atom and bond types, number of rings, ring size, and chemical motifs. Under constraints comparable to standard drug-like estimates, including molecular mass below 500 Da, our analysis yields a chemical space of approximately 10117 molecules at Assembly Index 25. Finally, we constrain chemical space by biologically relevant motifs and identify structurally relevant molecules near the accessible boundaries of these assembly-defined spaces.

AI.tldr: 本文利用Assembly Theory（组装理论）从第一性原理出发，通过组装指数（Assembly Index）量化分子复杂性，对化学空间的大小进行了估算。研究发现化学空间至少呈超指数增长，至多呈双指数增长。在药物类似物的约束下（分子质量<500 Da），化学空间在组装指数25处约为10¹¹⁷个分子，远高于传统估计的10⁶⁰。
AI.motivation: 传统化学空间估计（如10⁶⁰个类药物分子）忽略了分子的结构复杂性和合成复杂性。作者希望通过Assembly Theory引入可测量的分子复杂性指标，更准确、有依据地估算化学空间的大小及其增长规律。
AI.method: 利用Assembly Theory中的组装指数（Assembly Index），定义为构建分子图所需的最少递归键合操作次数。以GDB-13数据库作为参考，建模化学空间随复杂性增加的增长趋势，并施加原子类型、键类型、环数、环大小、化学基序等结构约束条件。
AI.result: 化学空间（组装指数水平集的累积）相对于组装指数至少呈超指数增长，至多呈双指数增长。在类药物约束（质量<500 Da）下，组装指数25处的化学空间约为10¹¹⁷个分子。此外，通过生物学相关基序进一步约束，可识别出位于组装定义空间可达边界附近的结构相关分子。
AI.conclusion: Assembly Theory为化学空间的系统性量化提供了新的理论框架，揭示化学空间远大于传统估计，并可将空间按复杂性分层，为药物发现和化学合成中的分子筛选提供理论指导。

title: Extrinsic quantum geometry in the quadrupolar bulk photovoltaic effect
summary: The bulk photovoltaic effect has become a valuable probe of the quantum geometry of Bloch bands. While it is restricted to inversion-broken systems within the dipole approximation, the finite momentum of light is appreciated to give rise to this effect even in centrosymmetric crystals, an effect referred to as "photon drag." In this work, we recast the photon drag effect at leading order in the optical wavevector, highlighting a previously neglected contribution arising intuitively from the electric quadrupole correction to light-matter coupling. In the language of band geometry, we identify this interband quadrupole as a multiband metric tensor that quantifies the variation of two resonantly driven states extrinsic to the subspace they span. We predict that systems in which three or more bands strongly admix in momentum space, such as twisted MoTe$_2$ bilayers, will have anomalously large photon drag due to this quadrupolar effect. Our work provides a conceptual bridge between band-geometric organizing principles and electromagnetic multipole corrections in nonlinear optics.

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视了中心对称晶体中的光子拖曳效应，发现电四极修正对光-物质耦合的贡献被此前忽略，并将其解释为多带度规张量，预言扭曲MoTe₂双层等系统中会出现异常大的光子拖曳效应。
AI.motivation: 先前对中心对称晶体中光子拖曳效应的理解不完整，忽略了电四极修正带来的贡献。作者希望从能带几何的角度系统性地重新描述这一效应。
AI.method: 在光学波矢的领头阶重新推导光子拖曳效应，引入电四极修正项；用能带几何语言将带间四极矩识别为多带度规张量，量化共振驱动态在子空间外的变化。
AI.result: 发现了一个此前被忽略的、来自电四极修正的贡献；指出在三个或更多能带强杂化的系统（如扭曲MoTe₂双层）中，该四极效应会导致异常大的光子拖曳响应。
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了能带几何组织原理与非线性光学中电磁多极修正之间的概念桥梁，为理解和设计新型光伏材料提供了新视角。

title: Unveiling the Interplay of Charge and Magnetic Excitations in HgBa$_2$Ca$_2$Cu$_3$O$_{8+δ}$
summary: Unraveling the mechanism that binds electrons into Cooper pairs in cuprate high-temperature superconductors remains one of the most fundamental challenges in condensed-matter physics. While both magnetic interactions and lattice vibrations are known to govern key electronic properties, their possible cooperation has never been directly observed. We investigate HgBa$_2$Ca$_2$Cu$_3$O$_{8+δ}$ (Hg1223) - the cuprate with the highest $T_{\mathrm{c}}$ at ambient pressure - as a magnifying glass to probe the possible entwining of the excitations at the core of the pairing. Using resonant inelastic X-ray scattering, we find that the charge response is dominated by dynamic charge density fluctuations (CDF) extending up to several hundred meV, where magnetic excitations reside. At the same momentum where CDF are most intense, the paramagnon energy exhibits a pronounced softening, revealing a strong interplay among charge, lattice, and spin excitations. Our results point to a cooperative mechanism in which dynamic charge fluctuations mediate the coupling between lattice, charge and spin degrees of freedom-shedding new light on the fundamental origin of high-$T_{\mathrm{c}}$ superconductivity.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过共振非弹性X射线散射（RIXS）对最高环境压力超导温度（Tc）的铜酸盐HgBa2Ca2Cu3O8+δ（Hg1223）进行探测，发现电荷响应由动态电荷密度涨落（CDF）主导，且其动量位置与顺磁子能量的显著软化相对应，揭示了电荷、晶格和自旋激发之间的强相互作用，表明动态电荷涨落可能作为耦合这些自由度的中介，在高温超导配对机制中发挥协同作用。
AI.motivation: 尽管已知磁性相互作用和晶格振动分别主导着关键电子特性，但它们之间可能的协同合作（entwining）从未被直接观测到。研究者希望揭示这两种激发如何在铜氧化物高温超导体中相互纠缠，以解决库珀对形成机制这一凝聚态物理的根本挑战。
AI.method: 选用环境压力下Tc最高的铜酸盐Hg1223作为"放大镜"，利用共振非弹性X射线散射（RIXS）技术，同时探测其电荷响应和自旋激发（顺磁子）行为，分析不同动量转移下的能谱特征。
AI.result: 1）电荷响应主要由能量范围高达数百meV的动态电荷密度涨落（CDF）主导，该能量区间正是磁激发（顺磁子）存在的区域；2）在CDF信号最强的动量位置，顺磁子能量出现显著的软化（softening）现象；3）这表明电荷、晶格和自旋激发之间存在强烈的相互耦合。
AI.conclusion: 实验结果指向一种协同配对机制：动态电荷涨落作为中介，将晶格、电荷和自旋自由度耦合在一起，为理解高温超导电性的根本起源提供了新视角。

title: Defect Tolerance in Trigonal Selenium Photovoltaics
summary: Understanding how point defects fundamentally influence photovoltaic performance remains a central question for emerging wide-band gap absorbers. Trigonal selenium (t-Se) has recently re-emerged as a promising photovoltaic material due to its near-optimal band gap for tandem and indoor applications. Here we quantify defect-assisted Shockley-Read-Hall (SRH) recombination in t-Se using first principles calculations across a large and chemically diverse set of point defects. Our results suggest that t-Se is intrinsically defect tolerant. Despite the presence of multiple deep levels in the gap, recombination via nonradiative multi-phonon emission processes is strongly suppressed by large lattice reorganizations and large energy releases of at least 0.5 EG per recombination event, while radiative defect-assisted capture also remains too small to account for the observed device losses. Consequently, SRH recombination mediated by realistic concentrations of point defects cannot account for the observed efficiency limitations in selenium photovoltaics. We explore trends in both radiative and nonradiative SRH recombination rates across the defect data set, highlighting their complex dependence on defect level position, lattice relaxation, charge state, and doping conditions. These findings establish trigonal selenium as a defect-tolerant wide-band-gap absorber and provide transferable design principles for optimizing next-generation photovoltaic materials for tandem and indoor applications.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算，量化了三角硒（t-Se）中多种点缺陷辅助的Shockley-Read-Hall（SRH）复合机制，发现t-Se具有本征缺陷容忍性：尽管存在深能级缺陷，但非辐射多声子复合过程被大幅晶格弛豫和高能量释放（≥0.5 EG）强烈抑制，辐射缺陷辅助捕获也过小，无法解释观测到的器件效率损失。因此，实际浓度点缺陷介导的SRH复合不能解释硒光伏的效率限制。
AI.motivation: 理解点缺陷如何从根本上影响光伏性能，对于新兴宽禁带吸收体至关重要。三角硒因其近优带隙（适用于叠层和室内应用）而重新成为有前景的光伏材料，但其缺陷行为尚不清楚。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理计算，对t-Se中大量化学多样性点缺陷的缺陷辅助SRH复合进行量化分析，包括非辐射多声子发射和辐射缺陷辅助捕获过程。
AI.result: 1) t-Se具有本征缺陷容忍性；2) 尽管存在多个深能级，非辐射复合被大幅晶格弛豫和大能量释放（≥0.5 EG）抑制；3) 辐射复合速率过低；4) 实际浓度点缺陷无法解释器件效率限制。
AI.conclusion: 三角硒是一种缺陷容忍的宽禁带吸收体，研究结果为优化下一代叠层和室内应用光伏材料提供了可迁移的设计原则。

title: Physically Constrained Ensemble Gaussian Process Modelling for Expensive Quantum Systems with Heteroskedastic Noise
comment: 14 pages, 6 figures in main text, 2 figures in Supp materials
summary: Accurate modeling of quantum many-body systems often requires computationally expensive simulations such as Density Matrix Renormalization Group (DMRG) or Quantum Monte Carlo (QMC) calculations. These methods, while precise, impose significant time and resource constraints, limiting their use in exhaustive parameter exploration. Moreover, these expensive simulations can contain variable errors over the large unknown parameter space, which needs to be quantified and propagated. Thus, predictive modelling is required to estimate the functional space accurately over scarcely sampled data with heteroskedastic noise, while preserving the physical relevance of the estimation. Therefore, we present a Physically Constrained Ensemble Gaussian Process (pc-EGP) framework designed to efficiently model complex and noisy quantum systems under physical consistency constraints. The proposed method first enforces physical constraints as a user controlled weighted penalty to the data-driven loss function of the Gaussian Process (GP) surrogates. Then an ensemble of such GP models is trained with variable noisy simulations via numerical quadrature method where these multiple GP(s) at different nodes is integrated as a quadrature weighted average. We first demonstrate the framework on synthetically generated data before applying to quantum systems. In the first case study, we leverage DMRG simulations of the Bose-Hubbard Model to predict the critical interaction parameter Uc governing the superfluid-to-Mott-insulator transition. In the second case study, we demonstrate our method on QMC simulations, of a quantum liquid confined inside a nanoporous silicate with the goal of optimizing a chemical environment to realize a one-dimensional superfluid. Compared to conventional GP, pc-EGP achieves a better balance of accuracy and physically meaningful predictions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种物理约束集成高斯过程（pc-EGP）框架，用于高效建模存在异方差噪声的量子多体系统，在物理一致性约束下实现准确预测。
AI.motivation: 量子多体系统的精确模拟（如DMRG、QMC）计算成本极高，且在大参数空间中存在变量误差，需要一种能够处理稀疏、异方差噪声数据的预测建模方法，同时保证预测的物理相关性。
AI.method: 提出pc-EGP框架：首先将物理约束作为加权惩罚项加入GP代理模型的数据驱动损失函数；然后通过数值求积方法训练集成GP模型，将多个GP在不同节点上的结果以求积加权平均形式整合。
AI.result: 在合成数据、Bose-Hubbard模型（DMRG模拟预测超流-莫特绝缘体转变临界参数Uc）以及纳米孔硅酸盐中量子液体（QMC模拟）三个案例中，pc-EGP相比传统GP在精度和物理合理性上取得了更优的平衡。
AI.conclusion: pc-EGP框架能有效处理含噪声的量子系统模拟数据，在保持物理一致性的同时提升预测性能，适用于计算昂贵的参数空间探索任务。

title: Invariants of Sequential Circuits and Generalized Non-Abelian Statistics
summary: Non-invertible symmetries in quantum many-body systems generally give rise to sequential unitary circuits that move symmetry defects. In this paper, we investigate invariants defined by sequences of such circuits, which move non-invertible defects and generate a Berry phase evaluated on quantum states with defects. We show that this Berry phase generally defines an invariant under local deformations, provided that the sequential circuits preserve the locality of those deformations. This invariant also rules out a short-range-entangled state that preserves the non-invertible symmetry, thereby signaling the 't Hooft anomaly of a non-invertible symmetry purely in terms of unitary operators acting on a state. We then apply this framework to loop excitations in three spatial dimensions and identify a new loop excitation in the (3+1)D $\mathbb{D}_4$ topological order, which we dub a non-Abelian fermionic loop. Using the invariant of sequential circuits, we characterize the statistics of non-Abelian fermionic loops. In addition, we find a new (3+1)D mixed topological order with a single non-Abelian fermionic loop, whose long-range entanglement is protected by an invariant of sequential circuits.

AI.tldr: 研究非可逆对称性中的顺序电路不变量，发现Berry相位可定义局域变形下的不变量，并用于识别三维空间中的新型非阿贝尔费米子环激发，以及发现由该不变量保护的长程纠缠拓扑序。
AI.motivation: 在多体量子系统中，非可逆对称性的缺陷移动由顺序幺正电路描述，需要研究这些电路所定义的不变量及其物理含义。
AI.method: 通过顺序电路移动非可逆缺陷并测量Berry相位，证明该相位在局域变形下保持不变，并利用该不变量分析环激发的统计性质。
AI.result: 发现(3+1)D 𝔻₄拓扑序中的非阿贝尔费米子环激发，以及一种仅含单个非阿贝尔费米子环的混合拓扑序，其长程纠缠由该不变量保护。
AI.conclusion: 顺序电路不变量不仅能检测非可逆对称性的't Hooft反常，还能分类新型拓扑激发并揭示其长程纠缠结构。

title: Path convergence in diffusion models
summary: We discuss diffusion-model paths interpolating between a target distribution known only through p patterns and a reference distribution that can be sampled. These interpolating paths can be constructed symmetrically or else in forward direction (often referred to as a "noising") from the target patterns to the reference distribution or in backward direction (as a "denoising") from the reference distribution to the patterns. For backward paths with identical diffusion noise, we consider the path convergence in number of patterns p towards the path for infinitely many patterns. In a one-dimensional test case, we show that this convergence is on a scale 1/sqrt(p), but with infinite mean square deviation. We demonstrate that the path convergence allows for extrapolation towards the p=infinity path which samples the target distribution. We provide a proof-of-concept extrapolation algorithm and propose the convergence and extrapolation of paths as a possible strategy for density estimation and generalization. We illustrate all our algorithms through pseudo-codes and provide Python implementations.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了扩散模型的路径插值问题，分析了有限模式数下路径向无穷模式数路径的收敛性（1/√p尺度但均方偏差无穷大），提出了基于路径收敛的外推算法用于密度估计和泛化，并提供了伪代码和Python实现。
AI.motivation: 通过分析扩散模型路径在有限样本下的收敛行为，探索利用路径外推实现密度估计和泛化的新策略。
AI.method: 1) 构建对称/前向/后向扩散插值路径；2) 在1维测试中分析路径随模式数p的收敛标度；3) 提出基于路径收敛的外推算法以逼近p→∞的极限路径。
AI.result: 路径收敛标度为1/√p，但均方偏差无穷大；路径收敛允许向p=∞路径外推，从而采样目标分布。
AI.conclusion: 路径收敛与外推可作为密度估计和泛化的有效策略，算法已通过伪代码和Python实现验证。

title: Symplectic and Thermodynamically Consistent Molecular Dynamics in the Frequency Domain
summary: We introduce Fourier integrator molecular dynamics (FIMD), a method for propagating selected vibrational motion of Hamiltonian systems stably and reversibly in time while analyzing and controlling dynamics in the frequency domain. This makes band selection and vibrational analysis features of the integrator rather than post-processing steps. We demonstrate the method with classical force fields, a machine-learned force field trained on quantum data, and semi-empirical quantum chemistry for CO$_2$ and the capped Ace--Phe--Tyr--NMe peptide. The method reproduces spectra within the chosen band, suppresses out-of-band response, reveals mode coupling, and demonstrates force-field dependence of spectral features, especially for the thermodynamically important low frequencies. FIMD offers an efficient and transparent way to probe the vibrational physics underlying spectroscopic and calorimetric observables.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Fourier积分分子动力学(FIMD)，一种在频域中稳定可逆传播选定的振动模式，同时实现带选和分析功能，并在CO₂和多肽体系中验证其抑制带外响应、揭示模式耦合及力场依赖性的能力。
AI.motivation: 传统分子动力学模拟中，振动分析和频带选择通常是后处理步骤，缺乏在传播过程中直接控制频域行为的方法。作者希望开发一种既能稳定传播又能同时分析和控制频域动力学的方法。
AI.method: 提出FIMD方法，将频带选择和振动分析内置于积分器中，而非后处理。在经典力场、机器学习力场和半经验量子化学三种框架下，对CO₂和Ace-Phe-Tyr-NMe多肽进行验证。
AI.result: FIMD能够在选定频带内准确重现光谱，有效抑制带外响应，揭示模式耦合现象，并展示不同力场对光谱特征（尤其是低频热力学重要区域）的依赖性差异。
AI.conclusion: FIMD提供了一种高效透明的方法来探测光谱学和量热学可观测量的振动物理基础，将频域分析从后处理转变为积分器本身的特性。

title: Polarization-Resolved Photon Statistics of Cavity Quantum Materials
summary: By forming hybrid light-matter states, optical cavities offer a route for engineering material properties, however, unambiguously probing the effects of light-matter coupling remains difficult. Here, we show that the polarization-resolved statistics of photons transmitted through a cavity, measurable via $g^{(2)}$, provide one such diagnostic. By relating $g^{(2)}$ to matter correlation functions such as the Raman structure factor, we link photon bunching and antibunching to material properties. By applying this method to the stripy-to-antiferromagnetic transition in the Kitaev-Heisenberg spin model, we find that polarization-dependent patterns of bunching and antibunching encode the magnetic point-group symmetries of each phase and characterize the behavior at the phase boundary. Finally, we predict measuring $g^{(2)}$ for output photon pairs polarized orthogonal to the input field will isolate higher-order light-matter scattering processes that probe higher-order material correlations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用偏振分辨的光子统计$g^{(2)}$作为诊断工具，通过将光子聚束与反聚束行为关联至物质关联函数（如拉曼结构因子），探测光-物质耦合效应。以Kitaev-Heisenberg自旋模型的条状-反铁磁相变为例，展示了偏振依赖的聚束模式编码磁点群对称性，并预测正交偏振测量可探测高阶物质关联。
AI.motivation: 光腔中光-物质耦合对材料性质的调控效应难以明确探测，缺乏有效的诊断手段。
AI.method: 建立$g^{(2)}$与拉曼结构因子等物质关联函数的理论联系，通过偏振分辨的光子统计测量解耦光-物质相互作用信息。
AI.result: 在Kitaev-Heisenberg模型中，偏振依赖的聚束/反聚束模式可编码不同相的磁点群对称性，并刻画相边界行为。
AI.conclusion: 正交偏振$g^{(2)}$测量可隔离高阶光-物质散射过程，为探测高阶物质关联提供新途径。

title: Ambient and Pressure Dependent Superconductivity with Hydrogen Storage Potential in Quaternary Hydride LiMgZr2H12: A Comprehensive First-principles Insights
summary: Molecular hydrides have attracted relatively less attention in the search for high Tc superconductors because their hydrogen quasi-molecular units tend to be electronically inactive for superconductivity. In contrast, hydrogen rich compounds under high pressure have been widely considered strong candidates for achieving room-temperature superconductivity. However, their dependence on extreme pressure conditions significantly constrains their practical applicability. This work investigates hydrogen-rich superconducting materials that may be stable under ambient pressure conditions. Motivated by recent studies on the MgZrH2n family, a LiMgZr2H12 structure with Pmmm symmetry was designed. The mechanical, thermodynamic, and dynamical stability of the compound, together with its electronic and optical properties, were systematically investigated using first-principles calculations. Li doping in LiMgZr2H12 significantly increases the hydrogen derived contribution near the Fermi level (EF) and strengthens the electron-phonon coupling constant (λ) compared with MgZrH6. LiMgZr2H12 exhibits a critical temperature of 72.76 K at ambient pressure, which is further enhanced by applying pressure. At 10 GPa the critical temperature increases to 77.3 K. Elastic property analysis shows that the material remains mechanically stable over the pressure range studied (0-10 GPa). It also behaves like a ductile material suitable for current carrying applications. The material has a high machinability index, which is much higher than that of stainless steels. In addition, LiMgZr2H12 exhibits a gravimetric hydrogen storage capacity of 5.36 wt%, indicating its potential as a promising candidate for hybrid hydrogen storage technologies. This work offers a new direction for designing high-Tc hydrides at ambient conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算设计了一种具有Pmmm对称性的LiMgZr2H12结构，在常压下展现出72.76K的超导临界温度，同时具有5.36 wt%的储氢容量，为寻找常压高Tc氢化物超导体提供了新方向。
AI.motivation: 分子氢化物中氢准分子单元在超导中电子活性不足，而高压富氢化合物虽有望实现室温超导但依赖极端压力条件限制了实际应用。因此，寻找常压下稳定的高Tc氢化物超导材料成为关键目标。
AI.method: 基于MgZrH2n家族研究，设计具有Pmmm对称性的LiMgZr2H12结构；采用第一性原理计算系统研究其力学、热力学、动力学稳定性及电子、光学性质；计算电子-声子耦合常数和超导临界温度。
AI.result: Li掺杂显著增强了费米能级附近的氢贡献并提高了电子-声子耦合常数；LiMgZr2H12在常压下Tc为72.76K，10GPa下升至77.3K；材料在0-10GPa范围内力学稳定，呈延展性，可加工性指数远高于不锈钢；储氢容量为5.36 wt%。
AI.conclusion: LiMgZr2H12是一种兼具良好超导性能和储氢能力的常压稳定材料，为设计常压高Tc氢化物超导体提供了新思路。

title: Topological Phase Transition in Mechanical Honeycomb Lattice
summary: Topological materials provide a new tool to direct wave energy with unprecedented precision and robustness. Three elastic topological phases, the valley Hall, Chern and spin Hall insulators, are currently studied, and they are achieved separately in rather distinct configurations. Here, we explore analytically various topological phase transitions for in-plane elastic wave in a unified mass-spring honeycomb lattice. It is demonstrated that the three elastic topological phases can be realized in this single lattice by designing mass, stiffness or introducing Coriolis' effect. In particular, the interface between valley Hall and Chern insulators is found to support topological interface mode for the first time. Perturbation method is used to derive the analytic effective continuum model in the neighbor of band degeneracy, and the physics in topological phase transitions are revealed through evaluation of topological invariants. The topologically protected interface states, their decaying profile as well as the pseudo-spin-indicating polarization specific for elastic wave are systematically analyzed, and these results are further confirmed numerically by Bloch wave analysis of domain wall strip and transient simulation of finite sized sample. This study offers a concise and unified analytical model to explore topology nature of elastic wave, and can provide intuitive guidance to design of continuum mechanical topological materials.

AI.tldr: 本文在统一的质量-弹簧蜂窝晶格中，通过设计质量、刚度或引入科里奥利效应，实现了三种弹性拓扑相（谷霍尔、陈和自旋霍尔绝缘体），并首次发现谷霍尔与陈绝缘体界面支持拓扑界面模式，通过微扰法推导出有效连续模型，系统分析了拓扑保护界面态及其衰减特性。
AI.motivation: 此前三种弹性拓扑相（谷霍尔、陈和自旋霍尔绝缘体）需要在截然不同的结构中分别实现，缺乏统一的平台来研究它们之间的拓扑相变及界面行为。
AI.method: 采用统一的质量-弹簧蜂窝晶格模型，通过调节质量、刚度或引入科里奥利效应实现不同拓扑相；利用微扰法在能带简并点附近推导有效连续模型；通过拓扑不变量评估揭示相变物理机制；结合布洛赫波分析和瞬态仿真进行数值验证。
AI.result: 首次实现了三种弹性拓扑相（谷霍尔、陈、自旋霍尔）在同一晶格中的统一；首次发现谷霍尔与陈绝缘体之间的界面支持拓扑界面模式；系统分析了拓扑保护界面态的衰减特性及弹性波特有的赝自旋指示极化。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提供了一个简洁统一的解析模型来探索弹性波的拓扑本质，可为连续力学拓扑材料的设计提供直观指导。

title: fitPALSpectra: Python fitting of positron annihilation lifetime spectra
summary: Positron annihilation lifetime spectroscopy (PALS) spectra are commonly analyzed by fitting multi-exponential lifetime models convoluted with the detector resolution function. In practice, this inverse problem is sensitive to initial parameter choices, parameter bounds, source corrections, and correlations between lifetime and intensity parameters. This paper presents fitPALSpectra, an open-source Python workflow for configurable PALS spectrum simulation, fitting, visualization, and reporting. The implementation uses an analytically integrated exponential--Gaussian response model, configurable source and sample components, constrained optimization, optional least-squares refinement, and machine-readable output of fit results, correlation matrices, and fitted curves. Validation on fully synthetic spectra with known ground-truth parameters shows accurate recovery of the simulated lifetimes, intensities, detector full width at half maximum, prompt shift, and background.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个名为fitPALSpectra的开源Python工作流，用于正电子湮没寿命谱（PALS）的模拟、拟合、可视化和报告。该方法使用解析积分指数-高斯响应模型、可配置源和样品组件、约束优化和最小二乘精炼，在合成谱上验证了寿命、强度、探测器半高宽、偏移和背景参数的准确恢复。
AI.motivation: PALS谱分析中多指数寿命模型与探测器分辨函数的卷积反问题对初始参数选择、参数边界、源校正以及寿命与强度参数间的相关性非常敏感，现有方法难以稳定处理这些问题。
AI.method: 采用解析积分的指数-高斯响应模型，支持可配置的源和样品组件，结合约束优化和可选的最小二乘精炼，输出拟合结果、相关矩阵和拟合曲线等机器可读格式。
AI.result: 在完全合成谱（具有已知真实参数）上的验证表明，该方法能够准确恢复模拟的寿命、强度、探测器半高宽、偏移和背景。
AI.conclusion: fitPALSpectra提供了一个开源、可配置且稳健的PALS谱分析流程，有效解决了参数敏感性和相关性问题。

title: The Kondo effect in ferromagnetic quantum critical CeRh$_6$Ge$_4$
comment: 9 pages, 7 Figures, accepted in Phys. Rev. B
summary: The mechanism of a pressure-induced quantum critical point in the heavy fermion ferromagnet CeRh$_6$Ge$_4$ has attracted interest, as ferromagnetic quantum criticality in a clean itinerant Ce compound is typically avoided. The localized versus itinerant character of the 4\textit{f} electrons is a key aspect for understanding this behavior. We investigated the electronic structure of the 4\textit{f} shell in CeRh$_6$Ge$_4$ using core-level photoelectron and x-ray absorption spectroscopy, demonstrating the hybridization of Ce 4\textit{f} with the conduction electrons. Linearly polarized x-ray absorption reveals a temperature-dependent linear dichroism consistent with the crystal-electric-field (CEF) sequence as inferred from the static susceptibility. This dichroism cannot be described by an ionic full-multiplet model alone, but is reproduced by including the Kondo effect within a single-impurity Anderson model in the non crossing approximation (SIAM/NCA). The Kondo effect mixes higher lying crystal-field states into a resulting multiorbital ground state with 4\textit{f} occupancy \textit{n}$_f$\,$\sim$\,0.9. Deviations at low temperatures between the measured linear dichroism and calculated dichroism suggest an orbital-dependent Kondo effect. A scenario in which there is a multiorbital ground state and orbital-dependent Kondo hybridization should be a starting point for a model of pressure-induced criticality in CeRh$_6$Ge$_4$.

AI.tldr: 本文通过光电子能谱和X射线吸收谱研究了CeRh₆Ge₄中4f电子的电子结构，发现其存在轨道依赖的近藤效应，并提出了多轨道基态与轨道依赖的近藤杂化是理解该材料压力诱导量子临界点的关键。
AI.motivation: 理解CeRh₆Ge₄中压力诱导铁磁量子临界点的机制，特别是4f电子的局域与巡游特征如何影响这一行为。
AI.method: 利用核心能级光电子能谱和X射线吸收谱，结合线性偏振X射线吸收测量温度依赖的线性二色性，并使用考虑近藤效应的单杂质安德森模型（SIAM/NCA）进行理论拟合。
AI.result: 观测到温度依赖的线性二色性，与静态磁化率推断的晶场能级序列一致；离子全多重态模型无法描述该二色性，而SIAM/NCA模型可以复现；发现4f占据数n_f~0.9，且低温下测量与计算二色性存在偏差，表明存在轨道依赖的近藤效应。
AI.conclusion: 多轨道基态和轨道依赖的近藤杂化应作为理解CeRh₆Ge₄中压力诱导量子临界性的模型起点。

title: Mass generation at a fixed point: A Functional Renormalization Group Study of the tricritical O($N$) model in $d=3$ and $N=\infty$
summary: Renormalization group (RG) fixed points are commonly associated with scale invariance and a divergent correlation length. We show that this connection can fail in the tricritical $O(N)$ model in three dimensions in the limit $N\to\infty$. Revisiting the line of fixed points identified by Bardeen, Moshe, and Bander, we use the functional renormalization group to clarify the mechanism leading to mass generation at its singular endpoint (the BMB fixed point). We demonstrate that the generated mass is nonuniversal and originates from the nonanalytic structure of the effective potential. We show that the critical exponent $ν$ which takes the value $ν= 1/2$ along the regular part of the BMB line, that is, for $0 \leq λ< λ_{\rm BMB}$, jumps to $ν= 1/3$ on the singular part of this line with the BMB FP, corresponding to $λ= λ_{\rm BMB}$, being the pivotal point between these two regimes. We also show how its singular potential emerges dynamically along the renormalization flow.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了三维三临界O(N)模型在N→∞极限下重整化群不动点与标度不变性、发散关联长度之间关联的失效现象，揭示了BMB不动点处质量生成的非普遍性机制，并发现临界指数ν在BMB线正则部分为1/2，在奇异部分跳变为1/3。
AI.motivation: 传统认知认为RG不动点必然伴随标度不变性和发散关联长度，但本文发现三维三临界O(N)模型在N→∞极限下这一联系可能失效。作者希望通过功能重整化群重新审视Bardeen, Moshe和Bander发现的固定点线，阐明其奇异端点（BMB不动点）处质量生成的机制。
AI.method: 采用功能重整化群（functional renormalization group, FRG）方法，分析三临界O(N)模型在N→∞极限下的RG流和有效势的非解析结构。
AI.result: 发现BMB不动点处生成的质量是非普遍的，源于有效势的非解析结构。临界指数ν在BMB线正则部分（0 ≤ λ < λ_BMB）为ν=1/2，在线奇异部分跳变为ν=1/3，BMB不动点（λ=λ_BMB）是这两种行为的转折点。还展示了奇异势如何在重整化流中动态涌现。
AI.conclusion: RG不动点与标度不变性/发散关联长度之间的对应关系并非绝对成立，存在反例。三临界O(N)模型在N→∞极限下展现了丰富的临界行为，包括非普遍质量生成和临界指数的非连续跳变，深化了对RG理论适用边界的理解。

title: Excited-state Properties Beyond the Excitation Energy from Orbital-Optimized Density Functional Calculations I: Dipole Moments of Rydberg States
summary: Rydberg excited states are challenging to describe due to their highly diffuse character. Orbital-optimized density functional calculations provide a better description of Rydberg states than time-dependent density functional theory. However, benchmarks have so far focused on the excitation energy, while assessments of dipole moments remain limited to the lowest excited state. Here, orbital-optimized density functional calculations with a plane waves basis set are used to compute the dipole moments of several Rydberg states of a set of molecules. Plane waves provide a flexible representation of the diffuse Rydberg orbitals, revealing limitations of atomic orbitals basis sets. A commonly used single-augmented atomic basis set yields inaccurate dipole moments even when the excitation energy is insensitive to the basis representation, and discrepancies with plane waves calculations persist for the most diffuse states even when extra augmented diffuse functions are added. The generalized gradient approximation functional PBE gives good agreement with higher-level calculations where available. The hybrid functional PBE0 further improves the results, while PBE with globally scaled explicit Perdew-Zunger self-interaction correction leads to larger errors and an overestimation of the dipole moment, despite restoring the correct asymptotic $-1/r$ behavior of the effective Kohn--Sham potential.

AI.tldr: 本文使用平面波基组的轨道优化密度泛函方法计算Rydberg激发态的偶极矩，发现平面波能灵活描述弥散轨道，揭示了原子轨道基组的局限性，并评估了不同泛函的表现。
AI.motivation: Rydberg激发态因其高度弥散的特征而难以描述，现有基准研究主要关注激发能，而对偶极矩的评估仅局限于最低激发态，缺乏系统性研究。
AI.method: 采用平面波基组的轨道优化密度泛函方法（OO-DFT），计算多个分子的Rydberg激发态偶极矩，并与原子轨道基组（包括单增广和双增广基组）进行对比，同时测试了PBE、PBE0以及带自相互作用修正的PBE泛函。
AI.result: 平面波基组揭示了原子轨道基组描述弥散轨道的局限性：单增广基组在激发能准确时偶极矩仍不准确；增加弥散函数后，对最弥散的状态仍存在偏差。PBE与高级计算吻合良好，PBE0进一步改进结果，而PBE自相互作用修正反而导致偶极矩高估和更大误差。
AI.conclusion: 对于Rydberg激发态偶极矩的计算，平面波基组优于传统原子轨道基组；PBE0是推荐的泛函选择，而全局尺度的Perdew-Zunger自相互作用修正并不改善偶极矩的预测精度。

title: Consistent Evaluation of Operators Involving the Position Operator in the Bloch Representation: Application to the Orbital Moment
summary: The position operator plays a central role in condensed-matter observables such as velocity, orbital moment, and electric polarization. In solid-state physics, the evaluation of operators incorporating the position operator has not reached a consensus, as observed in the operator-level discrepancy between the local circulation of Wannier functions and the self-rotation of wave packets. Here, to achieve a consistent evaluation of such operators, we propose three rules for evaluating operators involving the position operator in the Bloch representation. The rules are devised to satisfy physical conditions: independence from the choice of unit cell, preservation of Hermitian conjugacy for the product of operators, and recovery of the correct intraband velocity. We further address the gauge dependence of the position operator and introduce a scheme termed gauge filtration, which systematically removes gauge-dependent contributions from the operators containing the position operator. This methodology ensures that the quantities obtained from the operator evaluation correspond to observable physical phenomena. By applying our framework, we reconcile the results concerning the self-rotation of the wave packet and the local circulation of the Wannier function. We expect our proposal to establish a consistent framework for evaluating operators involving the position operator.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一套在布洛赫表示中评估含位置算符算子的三条规则，解决凝聚态物理中关于位置算符的争议，并引入"规范过滤"方案消除规范依赖，最终统一了波包自旋与Wannier函数局域环流的结果。
AI.motivation: 凝聚态物理中，位置算符参与的速度、轨道矩、电极化等可观测量在不同计算方法（如Wannier函数局域环流与波包自旋）之间存在不一致，尚未形成共识，亟需建立一个统一的评估框架。
AI.method: 提出三条规则：1) 独立于原胞选择；2) 保持算符乘积的厄米共轭性；3) 恢复正确的带内速度。同时引入"规范过滤"方案，系统性地去除含位置算符算子中的规范依赖成分。
AI.result: 统一了波包自旋与Wannier函数局域环流这两个此前存在分歧的计算结果，确保了算子评估所得物理量对应真实可观测量。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架为含位置算符算子的评估建立了统一且自洽的标准，有望成为凝聚态物理中相关计算的基础方法。

title: Mathematical Basis for Analyzing Superconducting Phase Transitions Using Catastrophe Theory
summary: We establish a rigorous mathematical bridge from quantum many-body path integrals to the cusp catastrophe model by Lyapunov-Schmidt reduction, which provides a theoretical foundation for analyzing superconducting phase transition using the catastrophe theory. First, it is proved that, near the critical point the infinite-dimensional effective action is diffeomorphic to a finite-dimensional catastrophe. Secondly, starting from Ginzburg-Landau free energy functional, the Euler-Lagrange partial differential equation can be reduced to the cusp catastrophe model. Thirdly, the fermionic imaginary-time path integral to the cusp catastrophe is derived through the Hubbard-Stratonovich transformation, Matsubara frequency expansion, and Grassmann algebra. Furthermore, we connect this framework with the adsorption potential theory we proposed, elucidating the catastrophic topological nature of the electron pairing mechanism in high-temperature superconductivity. The precise microscopic derivation of the adsorption potential from first-principles electronic structure calculations would strengthen the predictive power of the theory.

AI.tldr: 本文通过Lyapunov-Schmidt约化，建立了从量子多体路径积分到尖点突变模型的严格数学桥梁，为用突变理论分析超导相变提供了理论基础。
AI.motivation: 为超导相变（特别是高温超导中的电子配对机制）提供严格的数学基础，揭示其背后的突变拓扑本质。
AI.method: 采用Lyapunov-Schmidt约化将无限维有效作用量微分同胚为有限维突变；从Ginzburg-Landau自由能泛函出发，将Euler-Lagrange方程约化为尖点突变模型；通过Hubbard-Stratonovich变换、Matsubara频率展开和Grassmann代数推导费米子虚时路径积分到尖点突变。
AI.result: 证明了临界点附近无限维有效作用量微分同胚于有限维突变；建立了从Ginzburg-Landau泛函和费米子路径积分到尖点突变模型的双重推导路径。
AI.conclusion: 该框架与吸附势理论相联系，阐明了高温超导中电子配对机制的突变拓扑本质，且第一性原理电子结构计算对吸附势的精确微观推导将进一步增强理论的预测能力。

title: Screening of the Coulomb interaction in Carbon Nanotubes: A First-Principles cRPA study
summary: We investigate the electronic screening of long-range Coulomb interactions in carbon nanotubes with different chiralities using first-principles calculations within the random-phase approximation. Depending on their wrapping vector, carbon nanotubes exhibit either metallic or semiconducting behavior, providing an ideal platform to explore how reduced dimensionality and electronic structure govern screening in one-dimensional systems. The strength of on-site Coulomb interactions in these compounds falls within the range of 3.5 to 5 eV, which is approximately 2-3 eV smaller than the corresponding values in nanoribbon compounds. This reduction subsequently affects the value of long-range interactions, consistent with experimental results regarding the smaller binding energy of excitons in nanotubes. Despite their common carbon backbone, we find that the effective interaction landscape depends not only on metallicity but also sensitively on chirality and band topology. In particular, armchair and zigzag nanotubes with similar electronic character exhibit markedly different screening efficiencies. Our results establish a unified microscopic picture of electronic screening in carbon nanotubes and place them in direct context with previous first-principles studies of low-dimensional carbon nanostructures.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算，研究了不同手性碳纳米管中库仑相互作用的电子屏蔽效应，发现其相互作用强度（3.5-5 eV）比纳米带低2-3 eV，且屏蔽效应不仅取决于金属性，还对手性和能带拓扑结构敏感。
AI.motivation: 探究一维碳纳米管中约化维度和电子结构如何决定屏蔽效应，特别是不同手性（金属性/半导体性）对长程库仑相互作用的影响。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理计算，在随机相位近似（RPA）框架内研究不同手性碳纳米管的电子屏蔽特性。
AI.result: 碳纳米管中库仑相互作用强度为3.5-5 eV，比纳米带小2-3 eV；长程相互作用也因此减小，与激子结合能较小的实验结果一致；扶手椅型和锯齿型纳米管即使电子特性相似，屏蔽效率也存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 建立了碳纳米管中电子屏蔽的统一微观图像，并将其与低维碳纳米结构的先前研究联系起来；屏蔽效应不仅受金属性影响，还对手性和能带拓扑结构高度敏感。

title: Phonons and magnetism of kagome FeGe probed by nuclear resonant scattering
summary: Kagome FeGe hosts a $2\times2\times2$ charge-density wave (CDW) that strongly interplays with antiferromagnetic order. Here, we report $^{57}$Fe nuclear resonant scattering measurement to study FeGe across its long-range CDW and incommensurate magnetic transitions. Upon entering the CDW state, hardening of acoustic phonons and optical phonons around 22~meV, 27~meV, and 31~meV are observed in the Fe partial phonon density of states, which can be qualitatively captured by first-principle calculations. Upon entering the incommensurate magnetic phase, neither the phonon density of states nor the hyperfine interaction parameters change significantly, although a subtle feature associated with the incommensurate magnetic order or slow fluctuations is detected in the time-domain Mössbauer spectra. These findings show that the CDW in kagome FeGe significantly modifies its lattice dynamics and magnetism, evidencing an intertwined nature of the spin, charge, and lattice degrees of freedom.

AI.tldr: 本文通过$^{57}$Fe核共振散射实验，研究了Kagome FeGe在电荷密度波（CDW）和不相称磁有序转变过程中的声子态密度与超精细相互作用变化，揭示了自旋、电荷和晶格自由度之间的强耦合特性。
AI.motivation: Kagome FeGe具有与反铁磁序强烈相互作用的$2\times2\times2$电荷密度波（CDW），但CDW与晶格动力学及磁性之间的具体耦合机制尚不清晰，需要深入探究。
AI.method: 采用$^{57}$Fe核共振散射测量，结合第一性原理计算，分析FeGe在长程CDW和不相称磁转变前后的Fe部分声子态密度及超精细相互作用参数变化。
AI.result: 进入CDW态后，声学声子和~22 meV、27 meV、31 meV附近的光学声子发生硬化，第一性原理计算定性捕捉到该现象；进入不相称磁相后，声子态密度和超精细参数无明显变化，但时间域穆斯堡尔谱检测到与不相称磁序或缓慢涨落相关的细微特征。
AI.conclusion: Kagome FeGe中的CDW显著改变了晶格动力学和磁性，证实了自旋、电荷和晶格自由度之间存在相互交织的本质。

title: Coupling of diffusion and reaction in a thin cylindrical tube: Methodological drawbacks of the Fick--Jacobs approach
summary: We investigate a problem, that describes coupling between diffusion and reaction inside a thin circular cylindrical tube. The asymptotic solution of the posed problem is derived by means of the boundary functions method. We perform comparison of this asymptotic solution against corresponding exact solution, which revealed serious methodological drawbacks of known Fick-Jacobs reduction approach. The results obtained may be used to study a wide range of reaction-diffusion problems, when the Fick-Jacobs method cannot be applied.

AI.tldr: 本文研究薄圆柱管中扩散与反应的耦合问题，通过边界函数法推导渐近解，并与精确解比较，揭示了Fick-Jacobs简化方法的严重缺陷，提出了该经典方法不适用的反应-扩散问题的新解法。
AI.motivation: 现有Fick-Jacobs方法在处理薄管中扩散-反应耦合问题时存在方法论上的缺陷，需要更精确的渐近分析来弥补这一不足。
AI.method: 采用边界函数法（boundary functions method）推导薄圆柱管中扩散-反应耦合问题的渐近解。
AI.result: 渐近解与精确解的比较揭示了Fick-Jacobs简化方法存在严重的方法论缺陷。
AI.conclusion: 所获结果可用于Fick-Jacobs方法不适用的广泛反应-扩散问题，为该类问题提供了新的分析途径。

title: DSpinGNN: A Physics-Informed Equivariant Graph Neural Network for Dynamic Magnetic Exchange Prediction in Strain-Deformed Monolayer CrI$_3$
summary: Resolving the instantaneous, position-dependent isotropic magnetic exchange coupling $J_{ij}$ across a dynamically deforming crystal lattice requires a computational approach that simultaneously handles structural forces and magnetic interactions at length scales inaccessible to first-principles methods. Here we introduce DSpinGNN, a bifurcated machine-learning architecture comprising an $E(3)$-equivariant graph neural network (E-GNN) for classical Langevin structural dynamics and a physics-informed $Δ$-MLP that maps instantaneous local Cr-I-Cr bond geometry to isotropic exchange couplings, with the Goodenough-Kanamori superexchange relationship embedded as an analytical inductive bias. Trained on 345 DFT+U configurations of monolayer CrI$_3$ and evaluated on a strictly withheld 61-configuration test set, DSpinGNN simultaneously achieves an energy MAE of $1.1$ meV/atom, a force MAE of $6.5$ meV/Å, and an exchange coupling MAE of $0.18$ meV ($R^2 = 0.91$). Deployed at 400$\times$ scale in a 3,200-atom supercell under a collinear Ising-constrained adiabatic approximation at $5$ K, the model maps the local exchange response to a propagating biaxial strain wave. Wave reflection at periodic boundaries generates transient constructive interference regions where local compressive strain exceeds the DFT-established FM-to-AFM threshold, producing spatially heterogeneous exchange coupling textures that damp as the wave dissipates. Quantitative analysis yields a domain wall width of $ξ= 1.7 \pm 0.3$~nm and a constructive-interference oscillation period of $τ= 0.27$~ps -- mesoscopic observables inaccessible to direct DFT and constituting testable predictions for cryogenic magnetic force microscopy. DSpinGNN provides a reproducible, transferable framework for mesoscale exchange mapping in strain-driven 2D magnetic materials.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DSpinGNN，一种结合E(3)-等变图神经网络与物理信息Δ-MLP的双叉机器学习架构，用于在介观尺度上同时模拟晶格动力学和磁交换耦合。在单层CrI₃上训练后，模型成功在3200原子超胞中映射了应变波驱动的空间异质交换耦合纹理，预测了1.7nm的畴壁宽度和0.27ps的干涉振荡周期。
AI.motivation: 解决动态变形晶格中瞬时、位置依赖的各向同性磁交换耦合$J_{ij}$的计算难题，需要一种能同时处理结构力和磁相互作用、且能覆盖第一性原理方法无法企及的介观尺度的方法。
AI.method: 提出DSpinGNN双叉架构：(1) E(3)-等变图神经网络(E-GNN)用于经典Langevin结构动力学；(2) 物理信息Δ-MLP将瞬时局域Cr-I-Cr键几何映射到各向同性交换耦合，其中嵌入了Goodenough-Kanamori超交换关系作为分析性归纳偏置。在345个DFT+U构型上训练。
AI.result: 在严格留出的61构型测试集上，能量MAE=1.1 meV/原子，力MAE=6.5 meV/Å，交换耦合MAE=0.18 meV (R²=0.91)。在3200原子超胞中部署后，模型揭示了双轴应变波传播、周期性边界反射导致的瞬态相长干涉、以及超越DFT阈值的局域压缩应变驱动的空间异质交换耦合纹理，定量给出畴壁宽度ξ=1.7±0.3 nm，相长干涉振荡周期τ=0.27 ps。
AI.conclusion: DSpinGNN为应变驱动的二维磁性材料中的介观尺度交换映射提供了可复现、可迁移的计算框架，所预测的介观可观测量可直接由低温磁力显微镜验证。

title: Proximity-induced unconventional superconductivity and chiral topological phases in twisted graphene/NbSe$_2$ van der Waals heterostructure
summary: We study proximity-induced unconventional superconductivity in a twisted graphene/NbSe$_2$ van der Waals heterostructure using the Bogoliubov-de Gennes formalism. The normal-state parameters of proximitized graphene are extracted from ab initio calculations at a twist angle of $23.4^\circ$, which reduces the common symmetry of the heterostructure to $\mathbf{C}_3$. We construct symmetry-allowed superconducting gap functions of the graphene layer according to the irreducible representations of the $\mathbf{C}_3$ group, containing singlet and triplet pairing channels and their mixtures. Computing the topological invariants as a function of the mixing parameters, we find a rich phase diagram of chiral topological superconducting phases, characterized by nonzero Chern numbers $C\in\{-4,-2,2,4\}$. While the nature of the superconducting order parameter of NbSe$_2$ remains debated, the formation of the van der Waals heterostructure and the related symmetry reduction can alter the relative stability of competing pairing channels, potentially stabilizing a chiral component that is proximity-induced into graphene and triggers the topological phases identified here, making the twisted graphene/NbSe$_2$ heterostructure a promising platform for chiral topological superconductivity detectable via quasiparticle interference imaging and transport measurements.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了扭曲石墨烯/NbSe₂范德瓦尔斯异质结中近邻效应诱导的非传统超导性。通过Bogoliubov-de Gennes形式论和第一性原理计算，在23.4°扭曲角下（对称性降为C₃群），构建了允许的超导间隙函数。发现丰富的拓扑相图，Chern数C∈{-4,-2,2,4}，表明该体系是实现手性拓扑超导的有前景平台。
AI.motivation: 探索在扭曲石墨烯/NbSe₂异质结中，由于对称性降低（从原始对称性降至C₃群）而可能稳定存在的非常规超导态，特别是手性拓扑超导相，并研究其拓扑特性。
AI.method: 使用Bogoliubov-de Gennes形式论；从第一性原理计算提取23.4°扭曲角下石墨烯的近邻化正常态参数；根据C₃群不可约表示构建对称性允许的超导间隙函数（包含单重态和三重态配对及其混合）；计算拓扑不变量（Chern数）。
AI.result: 发现了丰富的拓扑相图，包含多个手性拓扑超导相，其特征Chern数为C∈{-4,-2,2,4}。异质结的形成和对称性降低可以改变竞争配对通道的相对稳定性，可能稳定一个可近邻诱导到石墨烯中的手性分量，从而触发所识别的拓扑相。
AI.conclusion: 扭曲石墨烯/NbSe₂异质结是实现手性拓扑超导性的有前景平台，可通过准粒子干涉成像和输运测量进行实验检测。

title: Nucleation instability preempts relativistic domain wall transport in high-exchange ferrimagnetic nanowires
summary: Current-driven domain wall motion in ferrimagnets can approach the spin-wave velocity, giving rise to relativistic-like dynamics. While this regime has been experimentally observed in crystalline ferrimagnetic garnets and amorphous GdFeCo, the material conditions that determine whether it can be accessed remain unresolved. Here, we investigate spin-orbit-torque-driven domain wall motion in high-exchange GdCo nanowires using magneto-optical Kerr effect microscopy. We find that nucleation preempts relativistic transport. In GdCo, no velocity saturation or high-field collapse is observed. Instead, the large exchange interaction raises the maximum spin-wave group velocity to $\approx 7\text{--}9~\mathrm{km/s}$, far above the experimentally accessible domain wall velocities. Before this limit can be approached, increasing current density and in-plane magnetic field induce domain nucleation, disrupting steady-state propagation. We map the boundary separating domain wall transport from nucleation instability and show that the nucleation threshold decreases with pulse duration, consistent with thermally assisted barrier crossing. These results identify nucleation as the mechanism that prevents access to the relativistic regime in high-exchange ferrimagnets and establish a dynamical phase boundary between steady propagation and nucleation.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了GdCo纳米线中自旋轨道矩驱动的畴壁运动，发现成核现象阻止了相对论性输运区域的实现，并建立了稳态传播与成核不稳定性之间的动态相边界。
AI.motivation: 铁磁材料中电流驱动畴壁运动可接近自旋波速度，产生类相对论动力学，但决定能否进入该区域的材料条件尚不明确。
AI.method: 利用磁光克尔效应显微镜研究高交换GdCo纳米线中自旋轨道矩驱动的畴壁运动，系统测量了电流密度、面内磁场及脉冲持续时间对畴壁动力学的影响。
AI.result: GdCo中未观察到速度饱和或高场崩溃；大交换相互作用将最大自旋波群速度提高至约7-9 km/s，远超实验可达的畴壁速度。在接近该极限前，增加电流密度和面内磁场会诱导成核，破坏稳态传播。成核阈值随脉冲持续时间减小而降低，符合热辅助势垒跨越机制。
AI.conclusion: 成核是阻止高交换铁磁材料进入相对论性区域的关键机制，研究建立了稳态传播与成核之间的动态相边界。

title: Multilayer Screening of Double and Conventional Perovskite Solar Cells Using SCAPS-1D and Machine Learning: Optimization of ETL, HTL, and Absorber for High-Efficiency Architectures
summary: The combinatorial design space of multilayer perovskite solar cells is vast, yet exhaustive experimental or computational screening of all possible material combinations remains impractical. Here, we integrate SCAPS-1D device simulations with machine learning to systematically explore 125 device architectures constructed from five electron transport layers (ETL), five absorbers (including lead-free double perovskites), and five hole transport layers (HTL). A representative subset of configurations is used to train a machine learning (ML) model, which predicts the power conversion efficiency (PCE) of the remaining unexplored structures. Leave-One-Group-Out cross-validation yields a Spearman rank correlation, demonstrating reliable ranking capability. SHAP (SHapley Additive exPlanations) analysis reveals that the HTL band gap, absorber band gap, and ETL electron affinity are the most influential descriptors, providing physical insights into interfacial recombination and charge extraction. The machine learning model identifies several high-performance configurations that are subsequently verified by full SCAPS-1D simulations. Among them, the device FTO/TiO$_2$/Cs$_2$AgBiBr$_6$/NiO/Ag achieves a PCE of 28.85%, and the ML-suggested structure FTO/SnO$_2$/Cs$_2$AgInBr$_6$/NiO/Ag exhibits 28.62%, outperforming a closely related literature architecture by approximately 4% absolute. Notably, eight of the top-11 structures employ the lead-free double perovskite Cs$_2$AgInBr$_6$. This work demonstrates that a physics-based, data-driven workflow combining SCAPS-1D, ML, and SHAP can accelerate the discovery of high-efficiency, environmentally friendly perovskite solar cells while providing transparent design rules. The approach is generalizable to other multilayer optoelectronic systems.

AI.tldr: 本文结合SCAPS-1D器件模拟与机器学习，系统探索了125种多层钙钛矿太阳能电池结构，通过ML预测和SHAP分析发现HTL带隙、吸收层带隙和ETL电子亲和能是关键描述符，最终识别出FTO/TiO₂/Cs₂AgBiBr₆/NiO/Ag（28.85%）和FTO/SnO₂/Cs₂AgInBr₆/NiO/Ag（28.62%）等高效无铅结构，证明物理驱动数据工作流可加速环保型钙钛矿太阳能电池的发现。
AI.motivation: 多层钙钛矿太阳能电池的组合设计空间极其庞大，传统的穷举实验或计算筛选所有可能的材料组合不切实际，因此需要一种高效的策略来加速探索高性能且环保的器件结构。
AI.method: 集成SCAPS-1D器件模拟与机器学习：先对125种由5种ETL、5种吸收层、5种HTL构成的器件架构进行子集SCAPS-1D模拟，用所得数据训练ML模型预测未探索结构的PCE；采用留组交叉验证评估模型排序能力；运用SHAP分析揭示关键物理描述符；最后用完整SCAPS-1D模拟验证ML识别的高性能结构。
AI.result: ML模型成功预测高效结构，经SCAPS-1D验证：FTO/TiO₂/Cs₂AgBiBr₆/NiO/Ag的PCE达28.85%，ML建议的FTO/SnO₂/Cs₂AgInBr₆/NiO/Ag达28.62%，比文献中相近结构高约4%绝对值；前11名中有8个采用无铅双钙钛矿Cs₂AgInBr₆。
AI.conclusion: 该物理驱动的数据工作流（SCAPS-1D+ML+SHAP）能加速发现高效环保的钙钛矿太阳能电池，并提供透明的设计规则，且方法可推广至其他多层光电器件系统。

title: From Topological Order to Mixed-State Phases: A Ground-State Probe of Fractionalized Excitations
summary: How do we detect topological phases from a single ground state? Entanglement entropy and spectrum have long been the standard tools -- but the reduced density matrix (RDM) itself contains far more information. We show that the RDM of a 2D topologically ordered system, expressed at the entanglement cut, realizes a 1D mixed-state phase. For the $\mathbb{Z}_2$ toric code phase, it is a 1D $\mathbb{Z}_2$ strong-to-weak spontaneous symmetry breaking (SW-SSB) phase, where deconfinement of anyons manifests as the short-range correlation of both $\mathbb{Z}_2$ charge and $\mathbb{Z}_2$ domain-wall in the RDM. The bulk $e$-$m$ duality translates into a Kramers--Wannier self-duality of the SW-SSB phase. Extending the framework to gapped $\mathbb{Z}_2$ spin liquids, the global spin-rotation symmetry manifests as an additional weak symmetry for the 1D RDM. Spin-$\frac{1}{2}$ spinons result in a cusp on the disorder parameter of spin-rotation at $θ=π$, providing a direct, ground-state signature of symmetry fractionalization. We verify this prediction analytically using the matrix product density operator formalism and numerically for the kagome-lattice resonating valence bond state. The proposed observable requires only a single ground-state wavefunction, making it amenable to quantum simulation platforms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用约化密度矩阵（RDM）将二维拓扑有序系统的单个基态映射为一维混合态相位，从而通过一维强到弱自发对称性破缺（SW-SSB）相的特征来检测拓扑序，并首次从单基态波函数中直接识别了对称分数量子化（spinon）的信号。
AI.motivation: 传统方法（如纠缠熵和纠缠谱）虽能检测拓扑相，但约化密度矩阵本身包含更丰富的信息。作者希望从单个基态波函数出发，发展一种更直接、更精细的探测拓扑序和对称分数量子化的方法，并使得这种观测在量子模拟平台上可行。
AI.method: 将2D拓扑有序系统在纠缠切割处的RDM视为一个1D混合态，分析其对称性结构。对于Z₂ toric code，该1D混合态呈现Z₂强到弱自发对称性破缺（SW-SSB）相，任意子退禁闭表现为RDM中Z₂电荷和畴壁的短程关联。利用矩阵乘积密度算符形式进行解析分析，并在Kagome晶格共振价键态上进行了数值验证。
AI.result: 证明Z₂ toric code的RDM对应1D SW-SSB相，且bulk的e-m对偶对应Kramers-Wannier自对偶。对于自旋液体，全局自旋旋转对称性表现为RDM的弱对称性，自旋1/2 spinon在旋转角θ=π处的无序参数上产生一个尖点，这是对称分数量子化的直接基态信号。数值结果支持该预测。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种从单个基态波函数检测拓扑相和对称分数量子化的新框架，仅需一个基态即可实现，适用于量子模拟平台。

title: Transferable Machine Learning of Electronic Hamiltonians with Superposition-of-Atomic-Potentials Features
summary: Machine learning (ML) of electronic Hamiltonians offers a unified route to electronic wave functions and physical observables. We introduce a Hamiltonian learning framework built on electronic features derived from the superposition-of-atomic-potentials (SAP) approximation, an efficient self-consistent-field initial guess that captures essential electron-electron screening. SAP quantities define a symmetry-adapted intrinsic atomic orbital learning basis and provide physics-informed inputs to an orbital-based graph neural network that predicts converged Kohn-Sham Fock matrices. To extend the approach to larger basis sets, we further develop a downfolding scheme that predicts large-basis electronic structure from minimal-basis features. On the QM9 dataset, the model accurately reproduces frontier and core orbital energies, dipole moments, and the full density of states. For organic charge-transport materials, it yields accurate intermolecular transfer integrals for benzene, tetracyanoquinodimethane (TCNQ), and tetrathiafulvalene (TTF) dimers, and transfers to unseen substituted-benzene heterodimers with a mean absolute error of 4.8 meV. These results establish SAP-based ML of electronic Hamiltonians as a transferable and scalable tool for high-throughput electronic-structure prediction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于叠加原子势（SAP）近似的哈密顿量学习框架，通过将电子特征与图神经网络结合，高效预测Kohn-Sham Fock矩阵，并利用降阶方案扩展到大基组，在QM9数据集和有机电荷传输材料中实现了高精度电子结构预测。
AI.motivation: 传统DFT计算成本高，难以高通量筛选材料；机器学习预测电子结构缺乏物理启发的特征表示，且难以在不同基组规模间迁移。
AI.method: ① 基于SAP近似提取电子特征（如轨道能量、 screened Coulomb势等）；② 构建对称性适配的内禀原子轨道学习基；③ 设计基于轨道的图神经网络预测Kohn-Sham Fock矩阵；④ 提出降阶（downfolding）方案，从最小基特征预测大基组电子结构。
AI.result: 在QM9数据集上准确复现了前沿/核心轨道能、偶极矩和态密度；在有机电荷传输材料中，对苯、TCNQ、TTF二聚体得到精确的分子间传输积分，对未见取代苯异质二聚体的MAE仅4.8 meV。
AI.conclusion: 基于SAP的机器学习哈密顿量方法具有可迁移性和可扩展性，为高通量电子结构预测提供了有力工具。

title: Spin-Orbit Torque and Magnetization Switching in 2D Ferromagnetic Devices
summary: Current-induced spin-orbit torque has emerged as a powerful technique for manipulating magnetization switching of ferromagnet/nonmagnet (FM/NM) based memory cell. By investigating nonequilibrium spin torque effect in a van der Waals heterobilayer, trigonal $\text{Cr}_{3}\text{Te}_{4}/\text{PtTe}_{2}$, the first-principles quantum transport calculations are applied to determine both local spin induction, resulting from Rashba-Edelstein effect in the FM layer, and spin current injection, flowing from the NM to the FM layer. Our work reveals that local spin induction significantly generates the fieldlike torque, which primarily governs the switching current in systems with strong in-plane magnetic anisotropy. Our work emphasizes the importance of optimizing spin Hall effect in the NM layer for perpendicular magnetic anisotropy (PMA)-based magnetization switching and maximizing the Rashba effect in the FM layer for in-plane magnetic anisotropy (IMA)-based switching.

AI.tldr: 通过第一性原理量子输运计算，研究了Cr3Te4/PtTe2异质双层中的自旋轨道转矩，发现局域自旋感应（源于Rashba-Edelstein效应）产生的类场转矩主导了面内磁各向异性体系的开关电流，并指出需针对不同磁各向异性类型优化不同层的效应。
AI.motivation: 探索范德华异质双层中电流诱导的自旋轨道转矩机制，以优化铁磁/非磁存储单元中的磁化翻转效率。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理量子输运计算方法，对Cr3Te4/PtTe2范德华异质双层进行模拟，分别分析局域自旋感应（Rashba-Edelstein效应）和自旋电流注入两种自旋转矩贡献。
AI.result: 局域自旋感应显著产生类场转矩，该转矩主导了具有强面内磁各向异性体系的开关电流；对于垂直磁各向异性体系，则需要优化非磁层的自旋霍尔效应。
AI.conclusion: 针对不同类型的磁各向异性，需要采用不同的优化策略：垂直磁各向异性应优化非磁层的自旋霍尔效应，面内磁各向异性应最大化铁磁层的Rashba效应。

title: Structural Changes and Transport Properties of $\mathrm{YBa_2Cu_3O_7}$ Locally Modified by a He$^+$ Focused Ion Beam
summary: Irradiation of a material with ions can cause various defects that can lead to structural phase transitions and the modification of the material's properties. Here we study the irradiation of the epitaxyally grown thin films of the high-temperature superconductor $\mathrm{YBa_2Cu_3O_7}$ with $30\,\mathrm{keV}$ He$^{+}$ ions which leads to the expansion of the crystal lattice, decrease of the critical temperature $T_c$ and eventually transition to an insulator. Fabrication of such insulating regions with a focused He-Ion beam with a spot size of $\sim 10\,\mathrm{nm}$ is a powerful technique for fabrication of superconducting nano-devices. Using low-temperature resistivity measurements, diffraction with a nanofocused X-ray beam and atomic force microscopy, we investigated how the structure and the electric transport properties of $\mathrm{YBa_2Cu_3O_7}$ depend on the irradiation dose in a range $10$--$100\,\mathrm{ions/nm^2}$ and on the lateral size of the irradiated area in a range $30$--$5000\,\mathrm{nm}$.

AI.tldr: 研究30 keV He⁺离子辐照对YBCO超导薄膜的影响，发现辐照导致晶格膨胀、Tc降低及绝缘体转变，并利用聚焦离子束技术制备纳米器件，系统研究了辐照剂量和区域尺寸对结构与电输运特性的影响。
AI.motivation: 探索离子辐照诱导YBCO超导薄膜结构相变及性质调控的机制，为聚焦He离子束制备超导纳米器件提供基础理解。
AI.method: 30 keV He⁺离子辐照外延生长的YBCO薄膜，结合低温电阻测量、纳米聚焦X射线衍射和原子力显微镜，系统研究不同辐照剂量（10-100 ions/nm²）和不同辐照区域尺寸（30-5000 nm）下的结构与电输运变化。
AI.result: 辐照导致YBCO晶格膨胀、临界温度Tc降低，最终发生超导-绝缘体转变；聚焦He离子束（光斑~10 nm）可用于制备超导纳米器件。
AI.conclusion: 系统揭示了辐照剂量和区域尺寸对YBCO结构与电输运的调控规律，为利用聚焦离子束技术精确制备超导纳米器件奠定了实验基础。

title: Chiral Magnons and Cycloidal Phonons in Altermagnetic CuF$_{2}$ Monolayer
summary: Altermagnetism establishes momentum-dependent spin splitting through non-symmorphic crystal symmetries, yet whether these same symmetries simultaneously govern spin and lattice collective excitations remains open. Here we show, using first-principles calculations and linear spin-wave theory, that monolayer CuF$_2$ hosts both chirality-split magnons and cycloidal phonons controlled by the same $P2_1/c$ symmetry operations. The altermagnetic order drives strongly anisotropic magnon chirality via symmetric anisotropic exchange, with Dzyaloshinskii--Moriya interactions acting as a weak secondary modulation. Crucially, the phonon and magnon chiral responses are directionally complementary: cycloidal phonon angular momentum emerges precisely where magnon chirality is symmetry-suppressed, and vice versa. The magnon bands further carry quantized Chern numbers $C^M = \pm 2$, confirming non-trivial altermagnetic topology. These results establish monolayer CuF$_2$ as a platform where a single symmetry framework engineers magnonic, phononic, and topological responses, providing a direct connection between altermagnetism and spin-lattice chirality in two-dimensional materials.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算和线性自旋波理论，证明单层CuF₂中相同的P2₁/c对称操作同时控制着手性分裂的磁子和摆线声子，其中磁子具有量子化的Chern数C^M=±2，磁子与声子的手性响应呈现方向互补关系，建立了交变磁性（altermagnetism）与自旋-晶格手性之间的直接联系。
AI.motivation: 探究交变磁性中非对称晶体对称性是否同时支配自旋和晶格集体激发（磁子与声子），填补交变磁性与自旋-晶格手性之间关系的空白。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理（first-principles）计算和线性自旋波理论（linear spin-wave theory），以单层CuF₂为研究对象，分析其P2₁/c对称性下的磁子和声子行为。
AI.result: 发现单层CuF₂中同时存在手性分裂的磁子和摆线声子；磁子手性由对称各向异性交换主导，Dzyaloshinskii–Moriya相互作用为弱次级调制；磁子与声子的手性响应呈方向互补；磁子能带携带量子化Chern数C^M=±2，证实非平凡交变磁拓扑。
AI.conclusion: 单层CuF₂作为一个单一对称性框架即可调控磁子、声子和拓扑响应的平台，建立了交变磁性（altermagnetism）与二维材料中自旋-晶格手性之间的直接联系。

title: Kinetic kagome magnetism: from self-trapping RVB polarons to semiclassical correlations
summary: To gain deeper insight into the role of hole kinetics in determining magnetism in highly frustrated doped Mott insulators, we consider the single-hole counter-Nagaoka problem on the kagome lattice, using magnetization as a tuning parameter. Near full polarization, a doped hole delocalizes upon binding reversed spins in a pattern of singlet bonds which we term resonating-valence-bond (RVB) polaron. These RVB polarons can have extremely small effective bandwidths, and hence exhibit self-trapping. By tuning the spin polarization, we track the evolution of these states toward the unpolarized sector, where we observe the emergence of $\sqrt{3}\times\sqrt{3}$ antiferromagnetic correlation reminiscent of the classical Potts and Heisenberg models on the kagome lattice. These results provide a framework to understand how RVB physics at short scales evolves into conventional magnetic correlations at long scales.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过研究kagome晶格上的单空穴反Nagaoka问题，发现掺杂空穴在近完全极化状态下会结合反转自旋形成共振价键（RVB）极化子，这种极化子具有极小的有效带宽并表现出自陷行为。通过调节自旋极化，这些状态向非极化区域演化，出现了√3×√3反铁磁关联，揭示了RVB物理在短尺度上如何演变为长尺度上的常规磁关联。
AI.motivation: 深入理解高度阻挫掺杂Mott绝缘体中空穴动力学对磁性的影响机制，特别是从短程RVB物理到长程常规磁关联的演化过程。
AI.method: 在kagome晶格上研究单空穴反Nagaoka问题，以磁化强度为调控参数，从近完全极化态出发，通过反转自旋形成单重态键（RVB极化子），并逐步调节自旋极化跟踪态演化至非极化区域。
AI.result: 发现了RVB极化子具有极小的有效带宽和自陷行为；在非极化区域观测到√3×√3反铁磁关联，类似于kagome晶格上经典Potts和Heisenberg模型的行为。
AI.conclusion: 该结果为理解短尺度RVB物理如何演变为长尺度常规磁关联提供了理论框架。

title: Berry-phase-based Topological Charge in Quasicrystals and their Observable Features in Photonic System
summary: Topological charges based on Berry phase play the fundamental role in the topological physics. However, such topological charges remain unexplored in quasicrystals, impeding the systematic understanding of topological states in such quasiperiodic systems. In this work, by deriving all the allowed topological charges according to group representation theory and the corresponding low-energy effective Hamiltonians, we establish a universal framework for Berry-phase-based topological charges in two-dimensional quasicrystals. Taking the $C_{8v}$ quasicrystal as an example, we demonstrate and characterize a higher topological charge of $C=4$, which is inaccessible in conventional periodic systems. Applying our framework to photonic quasicrystals, we uncover that the circling of photon momentum around the charge gives a $C$ times winding of the electromagnetic field distribution pattern. Such observable feature provides a direct experimental method to probe the topological charges. Our work paves the way for exploring topological charges in quasiperiodic matter, and fundamentally bridges periodic and quasiperiodic topological band theories.

AI.tldr: 本文通过群表示论推导了二维准晶中所有允许的贝里相位拓扑电荷，建立了普适理论框架，并在C₈v准晶中发现了常规周期系统无法实现的高阶拓扑电荷C=4，进一步在光子准晶中揭示了通过电磁场分布缠绕可直接实验探测拓扑电荷的方法。
AI.motivation: 准晶作为准周期系统，其基于贝里相位的拓扑电荷尚未被探索，阻碍了准周期系统中拓扑态的系统性理解。本文旨在填补这一空白，建立准晶中拓扑电荷的普适理论。
AI.method: 利用群表示论推导准晶中所有允许的拓扑电荷，构建对应的低能有效哈密顿量，建立二维准晶中基于贝里相位的拓扑电荷普适框架。以C₈v准晶为例进行具体演示，并应用于光子准晶系统。
AI.result: 建立了准晶拓扑电荷的普适理论框架；在C₈v准晶中发现了常规周期系统无法实现的拓扑电荷C=4；揭示了光子准晶中光子动量绕电荷环绕时，电磁场分布模式会产生C倍缠绕的观测特征。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为探索准周期物质中的拓扑电荷铺平了道路，从根本上沟通了周期系统与准周期系统的拓扑能带理论，并提供了可直接实验探测拓扑电荷的方法。

title: Superconductivity in the pressure-amorphized topological insulator CrP$_4$
