summary: The interplay among superconductivity, magnetism, and nontrivial band topology represents one of the most compelling frontiers in condensed matter physics. The exploration of novel superconductivity in 3d transition-metal compounds, particularly the rare Cr-based systems containing strongly magnetic Cr ions, has long attracted attention owing to their unconventional pairing mechanisms that challenge conventional wisdom. Yet, Cr-based superconductors remain scarce, especially those possessing nontrivial topological character, underscoring the urgent need to uncover new members. Here we report the observation of superconductivity in pressure-amorphized Cr-based topological insulator CrP$_4$. Upon compression, CrP$_4$ undergoes an anomalous quantum phase transition from a metallic to a semiconducting-like state at around 15 GPa, driven by significant changes in the electronic structure. At approximately 70 GPa, re-metallization with superconductivity occurs alongside an irreversible amorphization. The superconducting transition temperature Tc increases monotonically with pressure, reaching 4.8 K at 141.3 GPa. Furthermore, theoretical calculations predict multiple topological phase transitions from a strong topological insulator to a trivial state and finally back to a strong topological state under pressure. Our study not only establishes CrP$_4$ as the first Cr-based amorphous superconductor but also opens a new paradigm for exploring superconducting and topological properties in amorphous materials.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了在压力作用下，Cr基拓扑绝缘体CrP₄发生不可逆非晶化并出现超导电性，最高超导转变温度达4.8 K，同时伴随多重拓扑相变，首次发现了Cr基非晶超导体。
AI.motivation: Cr基超导体极为稀缺，尤其是兼具拓扑特性的体系极度匮乏，亟需发现新的候选材料来探索超导、磁性及拓扑之间的相互作用。
AI.method: 通过对CrP₄施加高压，结合电输运测量和第一性原理理论计算，研究其压力诱导的电子结构变化、非晶化过程及超导电性和拓扑性质演化。
AI.result: CrP₄在~15 GPa经历金属到类半导体转变；~70 GPa发生不可逆非晶化并出现超导电性，Tc随压力单调上升至4.8 K（141.3 GPa）；理论预言存在强拓扑绝缘体→平庸态→强拓扑态的多重拓扑相变。
AI.conclusion: 首次将CrP₄确立为Cr基非晶超导体，为在非晶态材料中探索超导与拓扑性质开辟了新范式。

title: Unveiling Orbital-mediated Ultrafast Demagnetization in Rare Earth-Transition-Metal Ferrimagnets
summary: The ultimate speed limit of magnetic recording and spintronic devices is set by the efficiency of angular-momentum transfer during ultrafast demagnetization, yet its microscopic pathway in Rare-Earth-Transition-Metal (RE-TM) ferrimagnets remains debated. Here, we establish an orbital-mediated framework in which 3d spin-orbit coupling (SOC) governs angular momentum (AM) dissipation. Strong 3d-SOC in RE-Co enables sub-picosecond, single-step demagnetization via direct orbital-to-lattice transfer, whereas weak 3d-SOC in RE-Fe redirects AM into 4f orbitals, producing slower two-step dynamics. The second-stage rate scales with 4f-SOC strength, revealing a distinct orbital-mediated dissipation channel. Using time-resolved magneto-optical Kerr measurements, supported by an extended four-temperature model, corroborate this picture across diverse RE-TM systems (RE = Sm, Gd, Tb, Dy, Ho and TM = Fe, Co, CoNi). Our results identify the SOC-driven competition between 3d and 4f orbital channels as the universal mechanism governing ultrafast demagnetization in RE-TM ferrimagnets, enabling rational design of the switching speed for next-generation spintronic devices.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了稀土-过渡金属（RE-TM）亚铁磁体中超快退磁的轨道介导机制：3d自旋轨道耦合（SOC）强度决定了角动量耗散路径——强3d-SOC（RE-Co）实现亚皮秒单步退磁，弱3d-SOC（RE-Fe）则通过4f轨道产生两步慢速动力学。
AI.motivation: RE-TM亚铁磁体超快退磁过程中角动量转移的微观路径长期存在争议，而这是决定磁记录和自旋电子器件速度极限的关键。
AI.method: 采用时间分辨磁光克尔测量，结合扩展的四温度模型，系统研究了多种RE-TM体系（RE=Sm,Gd,Tb,Dy,Ho；TM=Fe,Co,CoNi）。
AI.result: 发现3d-SOC强度是决定性因素：强3d-SOC（RE-Co）允许角动量直接转移至晶格，实现亚皮秒单步退磁；弱3d-SOC（RE-Fe）则使角动量先转移至4f轨道，产生两步动力学，且第二步速率由4f-SOC强度决定。
AI.conclusion: 建立了3d与4f轨道通道之间的SOC驱动竞争作为RE-TM亚铁磁体超快退磁的普适机制，为下一代自旋电子器件开关速度的理性设计提供了理论指导。

title: Structural responses incipient to pressure-driven antiferromagnetic quantum critical point of van der Waals heavy-fermion metal CeSiI
summary: CeSiI is a van der Waals heavy-fermion metal recently found to exhibit unconventional superconductivity near a pressure-induced antiferromagnetic quantum critical point (QCP) at Pc =6 GPa. Here, we report a comprehensive single-crystal X-ray diffraction study of CeSiI under high pressures up to 8.3 GPa at room temperature, revealing subtle structural responses that precede pressure-driven QCP. We find that the unit-cell volume decreases smoothly upon compression without showing any structural phase transition in the investigated pressure range. Intriguingly, we observe abrupt and concurrent anisotropic responses of the lattice parameters around Pc =6 GPa, i.e., the a-axis contracts while the c-axis enlongated suddenly, with the unit-cell volume smoothily varies with pressure. Structural refinements further show that these lattice anomalies primarily originate from changes of Ce-Ce and Ce-Si bond lengths, as well as a flattening of the inner honeycomb Si layer within the CeSiI monolayer around Pc. Our findings establish an interesting case linking pressure-driven electronic transition of QCP at low temperatures to incipient structural responses at room temperature, thereby providing fresh insight into the pressure-temperature phase diagram of CeSiI.

AI.tldr: CeSiI在室温下加压至约6 GPa时，晶格参数出现各向异性突变（a轴收缩、c轴伸长），但体积平滑变化，且无结构相变。这些晶格异常与Ce-Ce、Ce-Si键长变化及Si层扁平化相关，为低温量子临界点附近的超导提供了室温结构响应线索。
AI.motivation: 揭示CeSiI在压力诱导反铁磁量子临界点（QCP）附近的结构响应，探索室温结构变化与低温电子相变之间的关联，为理解非常规超导机制提供新视角。
AI.method: 在室温下对CeSiI单晶进行高压（最高8.3 GPa）X射线衍射实验，测量晶格参数、体积、键长等结构变化。
AI.result: 1. 无结构相变，体积随压力平滑减小；2. 在~6 GPa处，a轴突然收缩、c轴突然伸长，但体积连续变化；3. 结构精修显示异常源于Ce-Ce和Ce-Si键长变化及内层六角蜂窝状Si层的扁平化。
AI.conclusion: 室温下的晶格各向异性异常与低温QCP处的压力驱动电子转变存在关联，为理解CeSiI的压力-温度相图提供了结构层面的新见解。

title: Ferroelectric Altermagnetic Chern Insulator in magnetic field: electrical control of the Chern number
summary: The quantum anomalous Hall effect in altermagnets is difficult to realize because spin-up and spin-down states remain degenerate at the $Γ$ point in the nonrelativistic limit. We start from the Bernevig-Hughes-Zhang model to incorporate nontrivial band topology. We demonstrate that the combined effects of an external magnetic field, spin canting, and ferroelectric orbital hybridization lift the degeneracy at the $Γ$ point, enabling electric-field control of the Chern number. A minimal two-dimensional d-wave altermagnetic model with band inversion then realizes a ferroelectrically tunable Chern insulator with spontaneous spin canting. The ferroelectric polarization controls the topological phase and the orbital angular momentum, enabling a rich phase diagram with C = $\pm 1$ and C = $\pm 2$ through a Berry-curvature reorganization linked to the spin canting response and ferroelectricity. Our results establish a symmetry-consistent route to electrically tunable Chern insulating phases in altermagnetic materials, opening opportunities for low-power topological and orbitronic devices.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在交变磁体中实现量子反常霍尔效应的新机制，通过外加磁场、自旋倾斜和铁电轨道杂化的协同作用，实现了陈数可电控的拓扑绝缘体相。
AI.motivation: 交变磁体中自旋向上和向下的态在Γ点简并，难以实现量子反常霍尔效应，因此需要探索打破该简并的新物理机制。
AI.method: 从Bernevig-Hughes-Zhang模型出发，引入外磁场、自旋倾斜和铁电轨道杂化；构建二维d波交变磁模型，通过能带反转实现拓扑相变。
AI.result: 实现了陈数C=±1和C=±2的拓扑相，揭示了贝里曲率重排与自旋倾斜响应及铁电性的关联。
AI.conclusion: 建立了交变磁体中电可调陈绝缘体相的统一对称性框架，为低功耗拓扑和轨道电子学器件提供了新途径。

title: Substrate insulated Josephson junctions for superconducting quantum circuits
summary: We have developed a fabrication technique for Josephson junctions that employs a three-dimensional patterned, low-loss substrate instead of commonly used organic resists. The technique enables the fabrication of high-quality trilayer junctions from a wide range of geometries and materials, including high-melting-point superconductors such as tantalum or niobium. The junction electrodes are free from intentionally introduced oxides and organic materials, which are known sources of decoherence. We fabricate and characterize underdamped Nb/AlOx/Nb junctions of different sizes in several geometries. Such junctions enable manufacturing of quantum circuits operating at higher speeds and elevated temperatures.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于三维图案化低损耗衬底的新型约瑟夫森结制备技术，替代传统有机光刻胶，能够制造高质量三明治结，避免了有机材料和氧化物导致的退相干问题，实验验证了不同尺寸和几何结构的Nb/AlOx/Nb欠阻尼结，有望支持更高速和高温的量子电路运行。
AI.motivation: 传统约瑟夫森结制备依赖有机光刻胶和电极氧化工艺，这些材料是量子退相干的主要来源，限制了量子电路的相干时间和性能。
AI.method: 采用三维图案化低损耗衬底替代有机光刻胶作为模板，制备高质量三明治结构约瑟夫森结，支持多种几何构型和材料（如钽、铌等高熔点超导体）。
AI.result: 成功制备了不同尺寸和几何结构的Nb/AlOx/Nb欠阻尼约瑟夫森结，结质量高，且电极中不含人为引入的氧化物和有机物。
AI.conclusion: 该技术能制造出性能优异的约瑟夫森结，有望实现更高速、更高工作温度的量子电路。

title: Observation of coherently modulated phonon band and lifetime in superlattice
summary: Similar to the behavior of elementary particles, such as photons and electrons, the interference of phonon waves in artificial periodic nanostructures coherently modulates phonon band structures, serving as the foundation for phonon band engineering. However, direct observation of such coherently modulated phonon band structures remains challenging despite substantial insights from existing literature. Here, utilizing high-resolution inelastic X-ray scattering, we observed coherently modulated phonon band structures with phononic band gaps in a short-period GaAs/AlAs superlattice at 300 K and 500 K. Our findings provide the first direct evidence of phonon coherence at and above room temperatures, signifying a major advancement in the artificial engineering of phonon band structures. Furthermore, our experimental observations and ab initio lattice dynamics revealed that the coherently modulated phonon band structure enhances three-phonon scattering channels, strengthening high-order anharmonic effects such as three-phonon scattering and optical phonon softening. Our observations demonstrate the robustness of phonon coherence at high temperatures, and opens new routes for engineering phonon band structure and high-order phonon-phonon scattering by employing a flexible, bottom-up nanostructuring approach, with extensive applications in phononic metamaterials, microelectronics, and thermoelectrics.

AI.tldr: 本文利用高分辨率非弹性X射线散射，在短周期GaAs/AlAs超晶格中直接观测到由声子相干性调制的能带结构（含声子带隙），首次提供了室温及以上温度下声子相干性的直接实验证据。实验与第一性原理计算表明，相干调制的声子能带增强了三声子散射通道并强化高阶非谐效应，为声子能带工程开辟了新路径。
AI.motivation: 尽管人工周期性纳米结构中声子波的干涉可相干调制声子能带，但直接观测这种被相干调制的声子能带结构一直面临挑战，现有文献尚缺乏直接的实验证据。
AI.method: 采用高分辨率非弹性X射线散射技术，对短周期GaAs/AlAs超晶格在300 K和500 K温度下进行实验观测，并结合第一性原理晶格动力学计算进行理论分析。
AI.result: 成功观测到包含声子带隙的相干调制声子能带结构；发现相干调制增强了三声子散射通道，强化了高阶非谐效应（如光学声子软化）。
AI.conclusion: 首次提供室温及高温下声子相干性的直接实验证据，证明了声子相干性在高温下的鲁棒性，为通过灵活的底部向上纳米结构方法进行声子能带工程和高阶声子-声子散射调控开辟了新途径。

title: Intrinsic Nonreciprocity in Electron-Phonon Interaction Driven Thermoelectric Diodes
comment: Accepted for publication in Physical Review Research as a Letter
summary: We study an electron-phonon interaction driven thermoelectric diode. The nonreciprocity in this diode arises from the asymmetry between the probabilities of phonon emission and absorption in the electron-phonon interaction, as well as the structural reflection asymmetry. We reveal the intrinsic nature of this nonreciprocity, as the forward and backward electron transport remains asymmetric even when the applied temperature difference is not reversed. This intrinsic nonreciprocity gives rise to two novel transport phenomena. One is a novel thermoelectric effect which is driven by the temperature difference between the leads and the central device region, rather than the conventional temperature difference between the two leads. The second, and more significant, phenomenon is the suppression of electronic backscattering in the load resistor. This suppression decreases the resistance of the load resistor, which leads to the breakdown of Ohm's addition law. Under suitable conditions, the presence of electron-phonon interaction can yield a larger thermoelectric current compared to the case without it. This intrinsic nonreciprocity opens up a new pathway for low-power electronics besides topology and superconductivity, and for nonreciprocal thermoelectric devices.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一种由电子-声子相互作用驱动的热电二极管。其非互易性源于电子-声子相互作用中声子发射与吸收概率的不对称以及结构反射不对称。这种内在非互易性导致两种新现象：一是由器件中心与电极温差驱动的新型热电效应，二是负载电阻中电子背散射被抑制导致欧姆定律失效。在适当条件下，电子-声子相互作用反而能产生更大的热电电流，为非互易热电设备提供了新路径。
AI.motivation: 探索电子-声子相互作用驱动的热电二极管中非互易性的内在本质，揭示其超越传统拓扑和超导机制的新型非互易输运现象。
AI.method: 通过分析电子-声子相互作用中声子发射与吸收概率的不对称性，结合结构反射不对称性，研究热电输运的非互易特性。
AI.result: 发现两种新现象：1）由中心器件区与电极温差驱动的新型热电效应；2）负载电阻中电子背散射被抑制，导致欧姆定律失效。电子-声子相互作用在适当条件下可增强热电电流。
AI.conclusion: 内在非互易性为低功耗电子学和新型非互易热电设备提供了新途径，突破了传统依赖拓扑和超导的范式。

title: Integrated magnonic neural circuits based on nonlinear wave neurons
summary: Artificial intelligence is driving intense interest in alternative computing hardware capable of neural information processing beyond conventional charge-based electronics. Among emerging approaches, wave-based computing promises highly parallel and energy-efficient operation, but scalable physical neural hardware has remained elusive because wave systems generally lack cascadable nonlinear neurons with signal regeneration and phase-robust operation. Here we demonstrate integrated magnonic neural circuits based on nonlinear threshold neurons realized in nanoscale yttrium iron garnet waveguides. The neurons perform weighted summation of multiple spin-wave inputs, while a pump-controlled nonlinear activation defines continuously tunable firing thresholds. Owing to deeply nonlinear spin-wave dynamics, the activated neurons emit self-normalized outputs whose intensities are largely independent of the input amplitudes, while nonlinear phase self-adjustment suppresses sensitivity to the relative input phases, enabling deterministic neuron-to-neuron cascading without external signal restoration. We experimentally realize programmable threshold neurons, reconfigurable weighted classification and deterministic cascading between sequential neuronal stages, and further demonstrate reconfigurable physical pattern recognition in a seven-neuron integrated magnonic circuit through experimental classification of the binary letter patterns 'HUST'. These results establish nonlinear magnons as a scalable platform for integrated neural hardware and position nonlinear wave dynamics as a general paradigm for physical neuromorphic computing.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了基于纳米钇铁石榴石波导的非线性磁振子神经电路，通过泵浦控制的非线性激活函数实现了可编程阈值神经元、确定性级联和七神经元电路上的物理模式识别（识别'HUST'字母图案），证明了非线性磁振子可作为可扩展的集成神经硬件平台。
AI.motivation: 传统电荷电子学难以满足人工智能对神经形态计算硬件的需求，而波基计算虽具有高度并行和能效优势，但缺乏可级联的非线性神经元（无法实现信号再生和对相位鲁棒的操作），导致可扩展的物理神经硬件一直难以实现。
AI.method: 在纳米钇铁石榴石波导中实现集成磁振子神经电路：1）基于自旋波的非线性阈值神经元，可对多个自旋波输入进行加权求和；2）泵浦控制的非线性激活函数，实现连续可调的火警阈值；3）利用深度非线性自旋波动力学，实现自归一化输出和相位自适应调节，无需外部信号恢复即可完成神经元间确定性级联。
AI.result: 实验实现了可编程阈值神经元、可重构加权分类、顺序神经元级之间的确定性级联，并在七神经元集成磁振子电路中成功完成了对二进制字母图案'HUST'的可重构物理模式识别。
AI.conclusion: 非线性磁振子可作为可扩展的集成神经硬件平台，非线性波动力学可作为物理神经形态计算的通用范式。

title: Robust Spin Logic Enabled by Generalized $\mathrm{SU}(2)$ Symmetry in $p$-Wave Magnets
summary: Unconventional magnets combine the vanishing stray fields of antiferromagnets with the strong spin-splitting of ferromagnets, offering a unique material platform for spintronics. However, a critical challenge in realizing functional spin-logic devices lies in preserving long-range spin coherence against momentum-degrading scattering and gate-induced dephasing. Here, we demonstrate that the intrinsic momentum-dependent exchange field of a three-dimensional $p$-wave magnet can be precisely tuned against gate-induced Rashba spin-orbit coupling to establish a \textit{generalized} $\mathrm{SU}(2)$ spin-rotation symmetry. This emergent conservation law generates a symmetry-protected Persistent Spin Helix (PSH), effectively integrating the high energy scales of 3D bulk magnetic exchange with the macroscopic coherence of symmetry protection. By modeling a synergistic $p$-wave magnetic spin field-effect transistor (spin-FET), we reveal high-visibility Datta-Das conductance oscillations controlled purely by electrical gating. Crucially, our quantum transport simulations confirm that this symmetry-engineered transport regime exhibits exceptional resilience against strong non-magnetic Anderson disorder and geometric variations. These results establish a synergistic paradigm for non-magnetized spintronics, demonstrating how the active integration of spin-orbit coupling and unconventional magnetism can yield disorder-resilient spintronic logic.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过精确调控三维p波磁体的内禀动量依赖交换场与栅极诱导的Rashba自旋轨道耦合，建立广义SU(2)自旋旋转对称性，从而产生对称保护的持续自旋螺旋（PSH）。该机制在p波磁体自旋场效应晶体管中实现了高可见度的Datta-Das电导振荡，且对非磁性安德森无序和几何变化具有优异的鲁棒性，为抗无序的自旋电子学逻辑器件提供了新范式。
AI.motivation: 非传统磁体虽兼具反铁磁体的零杂散场和铁磁体的强自旋劈裂优势，但在实际自旋逻辑器件中，如何保持长程自旋相干性以抵抗动量退散射和栅极诱导的退相干是一个关键挑战。
AI.method: 通过理论建模证明，三维p波磁体的内禀动量依赖交换场可与Rashba自旋轨道耦合协同调控，构建广义SU(2)对称性，从而产生持续自旋螺旋（PSH）。在此基础上设计p波磁体自旋场效应晶体管（spin-FET），并进行量子输运模拟验证。
AI.result: 实现了纯电控的高可见度Datta-Das电导振荡，且该输运机制对强非磁性安德森无序和几何变化表现出卓越的抗干扰能力。
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了自旋轨道耦合与非传统磁性主动整合的新范式，为开发抗无序的非磁化自旋电子学逻辑器件提供了理论与实验方向。

title: Bulk-like Compressibility of the Au-Au Metallic Bond in the Atomically Precise $\mathrm{Au}_{25}$ Cluster
comment: Draft: 13 pages, 4 figures. Supporting information: 48 pages
summary: We present a high-pressure single-crystal X-ray diffraction study of the atomically precise $\mathrm{Au}_{25}(\mathrm{PET})_{18}^{q}$ cluster ($q=-1,0$) up to 10 GPa under strictly hydrostatic conditions. Our crystallographic analysis provides direct evidence for the pressure-induced phase transitions previously suggested by spectroscopic studies. Structural refinements reveal that the cluster accommodates compression through the reorganization of the flexible ligand shell and secondary distortions of the staple motifs, while the $\mathrm{Au}_{13}$ icosahedral core remains intact. Notably, the internal Au-Au distances exhibit a monotonic contraction that quantitatively mirrors the compressibility of bulk gold. This invariant rigidity at the sub-nanometer scale demonstrates that the fundamental stiffness of the metallic bond is preserved regardless of size. Our findings reconcile previous contradictions in the elasticity of metal nanostructures by isolating the intrinsic mechanical response of the gold kernel from extrinsic structural and experimental artifacts.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过高压单晶X射线衍射，揭示了Au₂₅(PET)₁₈团簇在10 GPa静水压下的结构演化：配体壳层和钉书钉基元发生重组与扭曲，但Au₁₃二十面体核心保持完整，且内部Au-Au键的收缩率与块体金一致，证明金属键的固有刚度不随尺寸变化。
AI.motivation: 先前关于金属纳米结构弹性模量的研究存在矛盾，可能是由于外在结构因素（如配体、配位环境）和实验伪影干扰了对其内在力学响应的测量。本文旨在通过精确的原子结构分析，隔离并揭示金纳米团簇核心的真实机械响应。
AI.method: 对Au₂₅(PET)₁₈团簇（电荷态q = -1, 0）在严格静水压条件下进行高压单晶X射线衍射实验，压力范围至10 GPa，并通过结构精修分析不同压力下的原子坐标变化。
AI.result: 1) 观察到压力诱导的结构相变，与光谱研究一致；2) 配体壳层和钉书钉基元发生重组与扭曲以容纳压缩；3) Au₁₃二十面体核心保持完整；4) 内部Au-Au键距单调收缩，压缩率与块体金定量一致。
AI.conclusion: 亚纳米尺度下金属键的本质刚度保持不变，表明金的弹性是尺寸无关的本征属性。该结果调和了此前关于金属纳米结构弹性的矛盾结论，强调必须区分内核的内在机械响应与外在结构/实验伪影。

title: Reflective Metastructure Q-plate for Ultrashort Laser Pulses
summary: The orbital angular momentum of light is an intriguing property for developing light driven applications. It emerged as an independent degree of freedom by which to manipulate light and, consequently, the interaction of light with matter. Several methods exist for the generation of light carrying orbital angular momentum, mostly employing transmitting or reflecting optical components, which radially modulate the phase profile of the light. As one of such components, transmissive q-plates established themselves as standard elements due to their usability over a broad wavelength range. Here, we present our approach to build a highly reflective q-plate based on a plasmonic metasurface capable of converting orbital angular momentum from the nanostructure to ultrashort laser pulses without temporal broadening. We highlight its working principle over a wide range of wavelengths for reflection under normal and gracing incidence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于等离子体超表面的高反射q板，能够将轨道角动量从纳米结构转移到超短激光脉冲而不引起时间展宽，并在宽波长范围及不同入射角下验证了其工作原理。
AI.motivation: 现有生成轨道角动量的方法多采用透射或反射式光学元件（如透射式q板），但在高反射场景及超短脉冲应用中存在局限性。作者希望开发一种高反射率、适用于超短激光脉冲且不引起时间展宽的q板结构。
AI.method: 构建基于等离子体超表面的高反射q板，利用超表面结构对光相位进行径向调制，实现对轨道角动量的转换，并在法向和掠入射条件下测试其宽波长范围的工作性能。
AI.result: 该超表面q板实现了从纳米结构到超短激光脉冲的轨道角动量转换，且不造成脉冲的时间展宽，在宽波长范围及法向/掠入射条件下均表现出色。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的等离子体超表面q板为高反射场景下的轨道角动量操控提供了一种有效方案，尤其适用于超短激光脉冲系统。

title: Modelling magnetic material properties with uncertainty-aware neural networks
summary: Machine learning is increasingly applied to accelerate the discovery of novel materials by exploring large compositional and structural design spaces. Yet, the scarcity of high-quality data and the frequent need for out-of-distribution prediction introduce substantial uncertainty, making the assessment of model reliability essential. In this work, we investigate uncertainty quantification as a means to evaluate model confidence in the context of permanent magnet research. In a first study, we benchmark classical and modern machine learning models for predicting intrinsic magnetic properties, focusing on the quality of their uncertainty estimates. We apply Gaussian negative log-likelihood loss and dropout-based Bayesian approximation as practical strategies for estimating predictive uncertainty. In a second study, we transfer these architectural features for uncertainty estimation to a more complex task: predicting coercivity from microstructural information using a graph neural network. Together, these studies demonstrate that uncertainty quantification not only enhances the trustworthiness of predictions but is also transferable across different modeling tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了不确定性量化方法在永磁材料机器学习预测中的应用，验证了Gaussian NLL损失和Dropout贝叶斯近似在预测本征磁性及微结构相关矫顽力任务中的有效性，并证明了不确定性量化可跨任务迁移。
AI.motivation: 高质量数据稀缺且常需进行分布外预测，导致模型可靠性评估至关重要，因此需要不确定性量化来评估模型置信度。
AI.method: 采用Gaussian负对数似然损失和基于Dropout的贝叶斯近似来估计预测不确定性；在第一个研究中基准测试多种模型预测本征磁性，在第二个研究中将不确定性估计架构迁移至图神经网络预测矫顽力。
AI.result: 不确定性量化不仅提升了预测的可信度，并且能够跨不同建模任务进行迁移。
AI.conclusion: 不确定性量化可增强模型预测的可靠性，并且具有良好的任务间可迁移性。

title: Heisenberg-Langevin theory of an exciton mirror
summary: We develop a Heisenberg-Langevin theory of an exciton mirror accounting for the retardation and the long-range electron-hole exchange. A particular case of a strong transverse magnetic field is analyzed in detail. The optical bistability due to repulsion between the excitons inside the light cone appears to be prone to a modulational instability towards the non-radiative surface polariton modes. Above the corresponding threshold, the pumped 2D exciton gas acts as an optical parametric generator of twin polariton beams. Conversely, below the threshold, the mirror acquires the phase-conjugating properties.

AI.tldr: 本文发展了考虑 retardation 和长程电子-空穴交换作用的激子镜的 Heisenberg-Langevin 理论，发现光双稳性易受调制不稳定性影响而转向非辐射表面极化激元模式，使得二维激子气体可作为光学参量发生器或相位共轭镜。
AI.motivation: 现有激子镜理论未充分考虑 retardation 和长程电子-空穴交换效应，作者希望建立更完整的理论框架，并探索强横磁场下激子气体的非线性光学特性。
AI.method: 发展 Heisenberg-Langevin 理论描述激子镜，考虑 retardation 和长程电子-空穴交换；在强横磁场特例下详细分析；通过理论分析研究光双稳性、调制不稳定性和参数下转换行为。
AI.result: 光双稳性易受调制不稳定性影响，导致激子从光锥内辐射模转向非辐射表面极化激元模式；低于阈值时激子镜具有相位共轭特性，高于阈值时充当光学参量发生器产生孪生极化激元光束。
AI.conclusion: 二维激子气体可作为可调谐的非线性光学器件，在阈值以下实现相位共轭镜功能，在阈值以上实现光学参量发生器功能。

title: Sonochemically Boosted Hydrogen Evolution Activity of Janus TMD Monolayers
summary: 2D electrocatalysts that enable hydrogen evolution at low overpotentials offer an attractive alternative to expensive platinum-based systems. Here, we report the growth of Janus transition metal dichalcogenide (TMD) monolayers (MLs), SeMoS and SeWS, on Au foils using chemical vapor deposition, and systematically compare their catalytic properties in the context of hydrogen evolution reaction (HER) with those of their parent TMDs. The Janus MLs exhibited significantly enhanced catalytic performance relative to the parent TMDs. Furthermore, these MLs on Au foils were subjected to sonochemical treatment in polar and non-polar solvents, in which the treatment with polar solvents led to a substantial improvement in the HER activity of Janus MLs. In particular, SeMoS MLs treated with water showed a low overpotential of ~63 mV, a Tafel slope of ~42 mV/dec, and an exchange current density of ~10$^{-3}$ mA cm$^{- 2}$, approaching that of platinum. Analyses indicate that enhanced electrocatalytic activity is associated with tensile strain induced by Au surface restructuring and the formation of defects in Janus MLs, as shown by experimental observations and by density functional theory calculations. The enhancement in catalytic performance due to sonochemical treatment emphasizes the importance of our results for developing novel catalytic systems for HER based on Janus 2D materials.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了通过化学气相沉积在Au箔上生长Janus过渡金属二硫族化物单层（SeMoS和SeWS），并系统比较了它们与母体TMD在析氢反应中的催化性能。Janus单层表现出显著增强的催化活性，尤其是经水处理的SeMoS单层实现了接近铂的低过电位（~63 mV）和Tafel斜率（~42 mV/dec）。增强机制归因于Au表面重构引起的拉伸应变和缺陷形成。
AI.motivation: 寻找能够替代昂贵铂基催化剂的二维电催化剂，开发低成本、高性能的析氢反应催化材料。
AI.method: 采用化学气相沉积法在Au箔上生长Janus TMD单层（SeMoS和SeWS），通过极性/非极性溶剂超声处理，结合实验表征和DFT计算分析催化性能增强机制。
AI.result: Janus单层相比母体TMD催化性能显著提升；极性溶剂（尤其是水）处理后，SeMoS单层达到~63 mV过电位、~42 mV/dec Tafel斜率和~10⁻³ mA cm⁻²交换电流密度，性能接近铂。
AI.conclusion: Janus TMD单层在HER中具有优异催化潜力，超声处理可进一步提升性能，为开发基于Janus二维材料的新型催化体系提供了重要依据。

title: Experimental straintronics in nanotube quantum dots
summary: Single-wall carbon nanotubes (SWCNTs) are narrow ribbons of graphene with atomically precise edges and a single quantum transport channel, at experimentally-relevant dopings. This makes them ideal systems to harness quantum transport straintronics (QTS), i.e. using mechanical strain to control accurately quantum transport. We present QTS data from three single-wall carbon nanotube quantum dot (SWCNT-QD) transistors over a broad range of in-situ tunable and reversible uniaxial strain ($Δ\varepsilon_\text{mech}\approx$ 0 to 3 %). We first present the nanofabrication of the suspended SWCNT transistors whose channel lengths are $\approx$ 30 nm. The channels are strained by moving gold clamps holding firmly the nanotubes. We present detailed charge transport data, $dI/dV_{\text{B}} - V_{\text{B}} - V_{\text{G}}$ and $dI/dV_{\text{B}} - V_{\text{B}} - Δ\varepsilon_\text{mech}$, showing a large mechanical-gating effect of the SWCNT-QDs. The precise reversibility of the data, and their agreement with QTS theory, confirms that the tubes are strained elastically. We demonstrate that the mechanical control of the QD doping is not due to capacitive-gating effects, but to quantitatively predictable bandstructure changes including a strain-tunable bandgap. This precise mechanical control of the doping and bandgap of SWCNT-QDs could find applications in qubits, condensed matter physics, and homojunction molecular transistors.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了单壁碳纳米管量子点晶体管中通过机械应变精确调控量子输运的实验结果，实现了0-3%的可逆单轴应变，并证实了机械门控效应源于能带结构变化而非电容耦合。
AI.motivation: SWCNT具有原子级精确的边缘和单一量子输运通道，是研究量子输运应变电子学（QTS）的理想体系，但此前缺乏系统的实验验证。
AI.method: 制备悬浮SWCNT量子点晶体管（沟道长度≈30 nm），通过移动金夹具施加可逆单轴应变（0-3%），测量dI/dV_B-V_B-V_G和dI/dV_B-V_B-Δε_mech输运数据。
AI.result: 观察到显著的机械门控效应；数据精确可逆且与QTS理论一致，证实弹性应变；机械控制掺杂源于可预测的能带结构变化（包括应变可调带隙），而非电容门控效应。
AI.conclusion: 机械应变可精确控制SWCNT-QD的掺杂和带隙，在量子比特、凝聚态物理和同质结分子晶体管中有应用潜力。

title: Spin-Polarized Electronic Structure and Chemical Bonding Data for 2,500+ Halide Double Perovskites
summary: Halide double perovskites (A$_2$BB'X$_6$) are a long-known class of materials that has recently been rediscovered for diverse applications, including photovoltaics, photocatalysis, and radiation detection. Their doubled unit cell provides immense chemical tunability, allowing the incorporation of magnetic ions and enabling access to a wide range of electronic-structure features, including different band-edge characters, alignments, and symmetries. Magnetic elements may further introduce spin degrees of freedom and magnetic behaviour, thereby broadening the functional landscape of these compounds. Here, we present the first comprehensive database of spin-polarised electronic-structure data for all halide double perovskites predicted to be stable by the recently introduced $τ$ tolerance factor by Bartel et al. The dataset focuses on the Cs$_2$BB'X$_6$ family, with X = I, Br, Cl, and F, and includes density of states (DOS) for $>$2,500 compounds, calculated using hybrid-functional density functional theory. Among these, 719 compounds exhibit band gaps in the visible range and 118 display half-metallic character. In addition, we provide chemical-bonding analysis using \textsc{lobster}, which provides insights into orbital interactions across the dataset. To facilitate exploration, we further offer UMAP-based visualisations and an interactive app for systematic investigation of chemical composition, electronic structure, and magnetic properties.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了首个卤化物双钙钛矿的自旋极化电子结构数据库（Cs₂BB'X₆，X=I, Br, Cl, F），包含超过2,500种化合物的杂化泛函DFT计算结果，其中719种具有可见光带隙，118种呈现半金属特性，并提供了化学键分析、UMAP可视化和交互式探索工具。
AI.motivation: 卤化物双钙钛矿因化学可调性强、可引入磁性离子而具有广泛应用潜力，但缺乏系统的自旋极化电子结构数据库，制约了对该类材料功能景观的全面探索。
AI.method: 以Bartel等人提出的τ容忍因子预测的稳定卤化物双钙钛矿为候选，采用杂化泛函密度泛函理论计算Cs₂BB'X₆（X=I, Br, Cl, F）的态密度（DOS），结合\textsc{lobster}进行化学键分析，并利用UMAP降维实现可视化。
AI.result: 建立了超过2,500种化合物的自旋极化电子结构数据库，其中719种带隙位于可见光范围，118种具有半金属特性。
AI.conclusion: 该数据库为卤化物双钙钛矿在光伏、光催化、辐射探测等领域的研究提供了系统性的数据资源，交互式工具可助力研究者高效探索化学组成、电子结构与磁性质之间的关联。

title: Enhanced localization length in a disordered one-dimensional band via cavity coupling to delocalized states
summary: We investigate the localization properties of cavity-coupled electronic states in disordered systems, motivated by recent proposals of cavity-mediated hopping in quantum Hall systems. We first introduce a minimal two-band model in which localized states in a disordered one-dimensional band are coupled, through a homogeneous cavity mode, to an excited band of delocalized states. Combining perturbation theory with a transfer-matrix approach, we show that cavity-assisted hopping between localized states decays exponentially with distance, implying that the eigenstates remain localized even beyond the perturbative regime. Nevertheless, the corresponding localization length increases with the light-matter coupling strength and can extend over several lattice sites in the single-electron ultrastrong-coupling regime. We then study a disordered Landau band coupled to a cavity mode within the framework developed in Refs.[1,2]. We find that the effective cavity-mediated coupling between edge states also decays exponentially with distance, but with a localization length that can reach micrometer scales for experimentally realistic parameters. By analyzing the inverse participation ratio, we show that this enhanced coupling is predominantly mediated by the most extended states of the upper Landau band. Our results demonstrate that, while cavity-induced hopping in disordered quantum Hall systems remains exponentially localized, the associated localization length can become sufficiently large for the corresponding states to exhibit effectively delocalized behavior on mesoscopic length scales.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了无序系统中腔耦合电子态的局域化性质，发现腔辅助跳跃在距离上呈指数衰减，但局域化长度随光-物质耦合强度增加而增大，在量子霍尔系统中可达到微米尺度，从而在介观尺度上表现出有效退局域化行为。
AI.motivation: 受量子霍尔系统中腔介导跳跃的近期理论启发，探究无序系统中腔耦合电子态的局域化性质，特别是光-物质耦合对局域化行为的影响。
AI.method: 建立最小两带模型，将无序一维带中的局域态通过均匀腔模与扩展态带耦合；结合微扰论和转移矩阵方法分析；利用逆参与率(IPR)分析量子霍尔系统中的边缘态耦合。
AI.result: 腔辅助跳跃在距离上呈指数衰减，但局域化长度随耦合强度增加而增长；单电子超强耦合下可达数个格点；量子霍尔系统中边缘态耦合的局域化长度在实验可行参数下可达到微米尺度。
AI.conclusion: 尽管腔诱导跳跃在无序量子霍尔系统中保持指数局域化，但局域化长度足够大，使得对应态在介观尺度上可表现出有效退局域化行为。

title: Boron Co-Alloying in AlScN Wurtzite Ferroelectrics: Insights from an 850-Sample Combinatorial Study
summary: AlScN wurtzite ferroelectrics are promising candidates for energy-efficient non-volatile memory. However, AlScN suffers from a high coercive field and reduced cycling endurance, and the limited tunability of its properties constrains further optimization. Co-doping AlScN with boron offers the promise of independently tailoring the chemical and structural properties, making AlScBN an attractive quaternary system. This material has already been explored for a few selected compositions, however, no systematic study of the full AlScBN compositional space exists. A combinatorial approach consisting of gradient deposition with HiPIMS at low temperatures of 250°C and automatic analysis of film properties allowed us to analyze a total of 850 unique samples within the AlScBN phase space. In addition to a full screening of the materials' chemical and structural properties, we fabricate and characterize combinatorial device libraries. XPS charge transfer analysis experimentally confirms that bond ionicity correlates with a reduction in the coercive field for AlScN and AlScBN systems, opposite trends are instead observed for AlBN. While the films maintain a high remanent polarization of 130-150 μC/cm2, Sc and B co-doping reduces the coercive field from 7 MV/cm to 3 MV/cm. Notably, B co-alloying lowers the amount of Sc needed to lower the coercive field, reducing reliance on this scarce element. In addition, we find that co-alloying with B, notably improves cycling endurance, which is related to a reduction in defect density. These results establish AlScBN as a scalable, CMOS-compatible ferroelectric, positioning it as an interesting alternative to AlScN.

AI.tldr: 本文通过组合梯度沉积和自动分析技术，系统研究了AlScBN四元铁电材料的全组分空间（850个样品），发现Sc和B共掺杂可将矫顽场从7 MV/cm降至3 MV/cm，同时保持高剩余极化（130-150 μC/cm²），并显著提升了循环耐久性，减少了Sc的用量。
AI.motivation: AlScN铁电材料虽是非易失性存储的理想候选，但存在高矫顽场、循环耐久性差及性能可调性有限的问题。本文旨在通过B共掺杂（形成AlScBN）来独立调控化学和结构特性，以解决上述瓶颈。
AI.method: 采用低温（250°C）HiPIMS梯度沉积结合自动分析技术，对AlScBN相空间的850个样品进行组合筛选；通过XPS电荷转移分析实验验证键离子性与矫顽场的关联，并构建了组合器件库进行电学表征。
AI.result: 1) XPS证实键离子性降低与矫顽场减小相关，但AlBN中趋势相反；2) Sc和B共掺杂将矫顽场从7 MV/cm降至3 MV/cm，剩余极化保持130-150 μC/cm²；3) B的加入减少了降低矫顽场所需Sc的含量；4) B共掺杂显著提升了循环耐久性，归因于缺陷密度降低。
AI.conclusion: AlScBN被确立为可扩展、CMOS兼容的铁电材料，是AlScN的有力替代品。

title: Stacking switching between correlation-protected radial Rashba field and persistent spin textures in graphene encapsulated by 1T-TaS$_2$ monolayers
summary: We investigate the electronic structure, spin textures, and charge to spin/orbital transport in graphene encapsulated by 1T-TaS$_{2}$ monolayers in the charge density wave phase. Using first-principles calculations, tight-binding modeling, and the Kubo formalism, we show that the encapsulation stacking dictates fundamentally distinct transport regimes. In the asymmetrical (AA) stacking, proximity fields from both interfaces constructively interfere, yielding a cumulative Rashba phase of nearly $π/2$. This pure radial Rashba spin pattern leads to the unconventional Rashba-Edelstein effect, which robustly dominates over the conventional response by a factor of 35 across a wide energy range. Conversely, the symmetrical (AA') stacking preserves a horizontal mirror symmetry, establishing a stable, purely out-of-plane persistent spin texture. Furthermore, the computed orbital Hall effect is exceptionally efficient, surpassing the spin Hall effect by three orders of magnitude. Within the proximity-induced spectral gaps, the orbital Hall conductivity exhibits a finite plateau, whereas the spin Hall conductivity vanishes. Our findings establish graphene encapsulated heterostructures as a promising system for realizing distinct charge to spin and charge to orbital interconversion regimes determined by the choice of stacking order.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了1T-TaS₂单层封装石墨烯异质结中，通过选择不同的堆叠顺序（AA vs AA'）实现截然不同的电荷-自旋和电荷-轨道转换机制。AA堆叠产生累积的径向Rashba自旋纹理和反常Rashba-Edelstein效应；AA'堆叠则维持纯面外持久自旋纹理。轨道霍尔效应比自旋霍尔效应高三个数量级，且在能隙中呈现有限平台。
AI.motivation: 探索通过堆叠顺序调控石墨烯封装异质结中自旋-轨道耦合效应和电荷-自旋/轨道转换的物理机制，以实现可设计的自旋电子学与轨道电子学功能。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理计算、紧束缚模型和Kubo公式，系统研究了1T-TaS₂/石墨烯/1T-TaS₂封装异质结在不同堆叠构型下的电子结构、自旋纹理和电荷-自旋/轨道输运特性。
AI.result: 发现AA堆叠中界面近场效应的相长干涉产生累积π/2的Rashba相位，导致反常Rashba-Edelstein效应主导常规响应（35倍）；AA'堆叠保持镜面对称性形成纯面外自旋纹理。轨道霍尔电导率比自旋霍尔电导率高三个数量级，并在能隙中呈现有限平台而自旋霍尔电导率消失。
AI.conclusion: 石墨烯封装异质结通过堆叠顺序选择可实现截然不同的电荷-自旋和电荷-轨道转换机制，为自旋电子学和轨道电子学器件设计提供了新平台。

title: Interfacial Coupling and Sparse Intercalation of 7-Atom-Wide Armchair Graphene Nanoribbons by N-Heterocyclic Carbene Monolayers
summary: Graphene nanoribbons (GNRs) synthesized on metal substrates experience electronic coupling and screening from the underlying surface, which, although often weak, can modify their observed properties and complicate their transfer to device-compatible substrates. Intercalation of GNRs by self-assembled monolayers (SAMs) offers a possible route to reduce this interaction. Here, we investigate the intercalation of 7-atom-wide armchair graphene nanoribbons (7-AGNRs) on Au(111) using N-heterocyclic carbenes (NHCs). Low-temperature scanning tunneling microscopy and spectroscopy, Raman spectroscopy, and density functional theory calculations reveal that the adsorption geometry of the NHCs strongly influences the intercalation yield for GNRs. Methyl-substituted NHCs form flat-lying dimers that partially intercalate the GNRs, producing locally decoupled segments. In contrast, bulkier isopropyl-substituted NHCs form upright monomers that embed the GNRs within the monolayer, preventing intercalation. The low intercalation yield indicates that lifting the nanoribbon from the Au surface is energetically costly. These results establish molecular adsorption geometry and packing as key parameters controlling intercalation at GNR-metal interfaces, with implications for the rational design of decoupling layers for GNR-based device integration pathways.

AI.tldr: 研究NHCs分子在Au(111)表面插层7-AGNRs时，发现甲基取代NHCs形成平躺二聚体可部分插层并局部解耦，而异丙基取代NHCs形成直立单体则阻止插层，表明分子吸附几何和堆积方式是控制GNR-金属界面插层的关键参数。
AI.motivation: 金属基底上合成的石墨烯纳米带（GNRs）会受到基底电子耦合和屏蔽效应的影响，这虽弱但会改变其本征性质，并增加向器件兼容基底转移的难度。自组装单分子层（SAMs）插层是降低这种相互作用的潜在途径。
AI.method: 使用低温扫描隧道显微镜（STM）、扫描隧道谱（STS）、拉曼光谱和密度泛函理论（DFT）计算，研究N-杂环卡宾（NHCs）对Au(111)上7-AGNRs的插层行为，比较甲基取代与异丙基取代NHCs的不同效果。
AI.result: 甲基取代NHCs形成平躺二聚体，可部分插层并产生局部解耦的GNR片段；异丙基取代NHCs形成直立单体，将GNR嵌入单层内部，阻止插层。整体插层产率较低，表明将GNR从Au表面抬起在能量上成本较高。
AI.conclusion: 分子吸附几何和堆积方式是在GNR-金属界面控制插层的关键参数，为合理设计基于GNR器件集成路径的解耦层提供了指导。

title: Gate-tunable spin-valley transport via carrier velocity in monolayer WSe$_2$
summary: We theoretically investigate spin- and valley-resolved quantum transport in monolayer tungsten diselenide (WSe$_2$) described by an effective massive Dirac Hamiltonian. Particular attention is devoted to a finite barrier region characterized by simultaneously modulated Fermi velocity and scalar potential. The barrier velocity $v_2$ is related to the external velocity $v_1$ through a velocity ratio $ξ=v_2/v_1$, motivated by an optical analogy with the Snell-Descartes law. The exact refraction condition depends on the full spin- and valley-resolved dispersion, and the simple ratio $ξ=v_2/v_1$ is recovered only in the massless, symmetric limit. The interplay of intrinsic spin-orbit coupling in the conduction and valence bands, quantified by $λ_c$ and $λ_v$, with spin- and valley-dependent Zeeman fields, $M_s$ and $M_v$, gives rise to substantial changes in the quasiparticle dispersion, leading to pronounced modifications of the transport characteristics. By solving the Dirac equation and enforcing current-conserving matching conditions at the interfaces, we compute the spin- and valley-dependent transmission probability and conductance. Our results demonstrate that the barrier velocity, scalar potential, incidence angle, incident energy, and barrier width serve as effective control parameters for transport, giving rise to strong anisotropy and resonant tunneling features. Furthermore, we show that both the magnitude and orientation of spin- and valley-polarized currents can be continuously tuned via velocity and potential modulation. These findings establish combined velocity and potential engineering as a powerful theoretical framework for controlling spin-valley physics in two-dimensional transition-metal dichalcogenides.

AI.tldr: 本文理论研究了单层WSe₂中自旋和谷分辨的量子输运，重点关注由费米速度和标量势同时调制的有限势垒区域，展示了速度与势垒工程对自旋-谷极化电流的调控能力。
AI.motivation: 探索通过同时调控费米速度和标量势来操控单层WSe₂中自旋和谷自由度的方法，建立基于速度-势垒工程的自旋-谷物理理论框架。
AI.method: 基于有效质量狄拉克哈密顿量，引入速度比ξ=v₂/v₁（受光学Snell-Descartes定律启发），考虑自旋轨道耦合（λ_c, λ_v）和自旋/谷相关的塞曼场（M_s, M_v），通过求解狄拉克方程并施加电流守恒匹配条件，计算自旋和谷依赖的透射概率与电导。
AI.result: 发现势垒速度、标量势、入射角、入射能量和势垒宽度可作为有效控制参数，产生强各向异性和共振隧穿特征；自旋和谷极化电流的大小与方向可通过速度和势垒调制连续调节。
AI.conclusion: 速度与势垒工程为控制二维过渡金属硫族化合物中的自旋-谷物理提供了强有力的理论框架。

title: Coupling Chirality, Polar Order, and Altermagnetic Spin Splitting in a Hybrid Manganese Chloride
summary: Hybrid manganese halides enable the coexistence of molecular chirality, polar order, and magnetic exchange within a single lattice. Here, we combine first-principles calculations with spin-space-group analysis to investigate the synthesized enantiomeric pair [(R)/(S)-MPA]2[MnCl4(H2O)] (MPA = beta-methylphenethylammonium). We predict that its compensated magnetic state hosts altermagnetic spin splitting in the nonrelativistic limit, and that the coupled chiral, polar, and magnetic degrees of freedom define a symmetry-related manifold. From this manifold, we derive simple sign rules for the electronic and magneto-optical response: reversing both chirality and polarity, or reversing the magnetic domain alone, inverts the spin splitting throughout the Brillouin zone, whereas reversing chirality alone or polarity alone changes the spin-splitting sign only in symmetry-selected regions. With spin-orbit coupling, reversing chirality or magnetic order flips the Kerr rotation angle, while changing the polar variant leaves it unchanged. These results reveal a chemically accessible route to translate molecular handedness into symmetry-controlled spin splitting and magneto-optical readout in hybrid manganese halides. Critically, we show that the sign and momentum pattern of the splitting are governed by the interplay of the chiral, polar, and magnetic degrees of freedom. This interplay opens the possibility to control the spin splitting through a judicious design of the organic cations, by modulating their chirality and polarity.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过第一性原理和自旋空间群分析，预测了杂化锰卤化物[(R)/(S)-MPA]2[MnCl4(H2O)]中存在交替磁自旋劈裂，并揭示了手性、极性和磁性自由度对电子和磁光响应的符号调控规律。
AI.motivation: 探索在单一晶格中同时实现分子手性、极序和磁交换共存的杂化锰卤化物，并研究其自旋劈裂的起源和调控机制。
AI.method: 结合第一性原理计算与自旋空间群分析，研究合成的对映体对[(R)/(S)-MPA]2[MnCl4(H2O)]，分析其补偿磁态中的交替磁自旋劈裂及手性、极性、磁性自由度的耦合关系。
AI.result: 预测了非相对论极限下的交替磁自旋劈裂；推导出电子和磁光响应的符号规则：同时反转手性和极性或仅反转磁畴会反转整个布里渊区的自旋劈裂，而仅反转手性或极性仅在特定区域改变自旋劈裂符号；自旋轨道耦合下，反转手性或磁序会翻转Kerr旋转角，改变极性变体则不变。
AI.conclusion: 分子手性可通过对称性控制自旋劈裂和磁光读出，且自旋劈裂的符号和动量模式由手性、极性和磁自由度的相互耦合决定，为通过设计有机阳离子的手性和极性来调控自旋劈裂提供了化学途径。

title: Residual stress gradient in a thin film within the dislocation pile-up theory
summary: A model for predicting the residual stress gradient in a thin film segment is developed on the basis of the theory of dislocation pile-ups. The initial shear stress within the film is relaxed via the formation of a pile-up of screw dislocations against the impenetrable film-substrate interface. Plastic strain is related to the dislocation density, leading to a fundamental equation, which links the residual stress to this density. The distribution of dislocations within the pile-up for an arbitrary, non-uniform residual stress profile is derived analytically by applying the force balance condition. This results in a singular integro-differential equation for the residual stress profile. The equation is solved numerically by a collocation method for various initial stress distributions: constant, linear, parabolic, and exponential functions. The solutions demonstrate that the established residual stress profile strongly depends on the film segment's thickness-to-width ratio and the initial stress distribution. As this ratio increases, stress relaxation becomes more effective away from the film-substrate interface. In all cases, equilibrium requires a pile-up containing dislocations with both positive and negative Burgers vectors. The total number of dislocations and their density distribution vary significantly with the initial stress profile. This model provides a critical step towards more complex models of residual stress formation in constrained material systems, specifically, thin films.

AI.tldr: 基于位错塞积理论，本文建立了一个预测薄膜段残余应力梯度的模型。通过数值求解奇异积分-微分方程，发现残余应力分布强烈依赖于薄膜的厚宽比和初始应力分布，且平衡状态下塞积中同时包含正负Burgers矢量的位错。
AI.motivation: 在约束材料系统（如薄膜）中，残余应力的形成机制尚不明确，现有模型难以准确预测应力梯度分布。本文旨在从位错塞积理论出发，建立更基础的物理模型来理解这一现象。
AI.method: 基于位错塞积理论，建立初始剪切应力通过螺位错塞积在薄膜-基底界面处松弛的模型。将塑性应变与位错密度关联，推导出连接残余应力与位错密度的基本方程。通过力平衡条件，解析推导出任意非均匀残余应力分布下的位错分布函数，得到奇异积分-微分方程，并采用配点法进行数值求解。
AI.result: 不同初始应力分布（常数、线性、抛物线、指数函数）下的数值解表明：残余应力分布强烈依赖于薄膜段的厚宽比和初始应力分布；厚宽比越大，远离界面处的应力松弛越有效；所有情况下平衡态都需要包含正负Burgers矢量的位错塞积；位错总数和密度分布随初始应力剖面显著变化。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为建立更复杂的约束材料系统（特别是薄膜）中残余应力形成模型提供了关键一步，揭示了位错机制在应力松弛中的核心作用。

title: In Situ Dynamics of the Microscopic Crystallographic Dehydration Pathway in a Model Channel Hydrate, Theophylline
summary: Solid-state phase transformations in molecular crystal hydrates govern stability and functional performance across a range of applications, including pharmaceutical, agrochemical and coordination framework materials. During dehydration, these hydrates can undergo substantial structural reorganisation involving changes in molecular orientation, intermolecular interactions, and lattice symmetry. Despite extensive study, the microscopic crystallographic pathways by which such transformations proceed remain poorly understood. Here, we investigate the dynamics of solid-state dehydration of theophylline monohydrate as a model molecular hydrate using in situ low-dose scanning electron diffraction (SED). Simultaneous observations of changes in morphology and crystallographic phase and orientation mapped across single particles reveal how complete dehydration proceeds via a two-step, reconstructive topotactic solid-state transformation: anisotropic, surface-specific mass loss of material near water channel sides (suggesting the monohydrate adopts a non-centrosymmetric crystal structure) is followed by surface-localised nucleation and growth of anhydrous form II on the parent monohydrate while preserving similar molecular orientations at a common plane. By providing direct, local crystallographic insight into hydrate dehydration, this work demonstrates how surface-controlled mass loss, morphological changes, and lattice orientation jointly govern solid-state transformations in molecular hydrates. More broadly, it establishes low-dose SED as an effective approach for probing dynamic phase transformations in beam-sensitive molecular crystals.

AI.tldr: 本文利用原位低剂量扫描电子衍射（SED）技术，以茶碱一水合物为模型，揭示了分子晶体水合物脱水过程中经历了两步重构性拓扑固相转变：先是各向异性、表面特异性的质量损失，随后是表面成核与无水相的生长。
AI.motivation: 水合物脱水过程中的微观晶体学路径尚不明确，缺乏对形貌变化、晶体取向与相变之间关联的直接观察手段。
AI.method: 采用原位低剂量扫描电子衍射（SED）技术，同时对单个颗粒的形貌变化、晶体学相和取向进行观测。
AI.result: 发现脱水过程为两步重构性拓扑转变：1）靠近水通道侧面的各向异性、表面特异性质量损失（暗示非中心对称结构）；2）在母体一水合物表面局域成核并生长无水II型，同时保持共格平面上的分子取向相似。
AI.conclusion: 表面控制的质量损失、形貌变化和晶格取向共同主导分子水合物的固相转变；低剂量SED是研究束敏感分子晶体动态相变的有效工具。

title: Direct nanoscale observation of melting and solute redistribution in a hypoeutectic Al-Cu alloy with in situ STEM
summary: Melting and solidification of eutectic systems is a classical topic in physical metallurgy, yet the mechanisms at nanoscale are less investigated, due to experimental limitations in spatiotemporal resolution. The advent of \textit{in situ} STEM heating with MEMS technology has recently enabled investigation of eutectic behavior as a function of temperature, time and electrical resistivity. Using this methodology, we investigate the evolution of a nanocrystalline hypoeutectic Al--Cu alloy. Melting initiated in the hotter central region and propagated outward, with grain boundaries acting as preferred sites for eutectic liquid formation via Cu enrichment. The Al$_2$Cu phase melted prior to complete matrix melting. Liquid-state Cu redistribution over a distance of \SI{258}{\micro\metre} -- several orders of magnitude beyond solid-state diffusion limits -- resulted in Al-rich rim accumulations and Cu enrichment at the outermost edge of the observed chip region. These observations are discussed in the context of classical predictions for melting of eutectic systems.

AI.tldr: 本文利用原位STEM加热技术，研究了纳米晶亚共晶Al-Cu合金的熔化和凝固行为，发现熔化从中心高温区开始沿晶界扩展，Al₂Cu相先于基体熔化，液态Cu可长距离（258微米）迁移，远超固态扩散极限。
AI.motivation: 共晶体系在纳米尺度的熔化和凝固机制尚不清晰，受限于传统实验方法的时间和空间分辨率。本文旨在利用原位STEM加热技术，突破这一局限，探究纳米晶亚共晶Al-Cu合金在加热过程中的微观演化机制。
AI.method: 采用原位扫描透射电镜（STEM）加热技术，结合MEMS芯片平台，对纳米晶亚共晶Al-Cu合金进行加热实验，实时观察其熔化和凝固过程，并分析温度、时间和电阻率对微观结构演化的影响。
AI.result: 熔化从中心高温区域开始向外扩展；晶界优先作为共晶液相形成的位点（通过Cu富集）；Al₂Cu相在基体完全熔化之前先熔化；液态Cu可在258微米范围内重新分布，远超固态扩散极限，导致Al-rich环状富集和边缘Cu富集。
AI.conclusion: 本实验观察结果与经典共晶熔化理论预测进行了对比讨论，证实了纳米尺度下共晶熔化行为与宏观尺度存在显著差异，特别是在液态元素长距离迁移方面。

title: Scalable Conformal MoSx Catalyst for Efficient Hydrogen Evolution at Industrial-Level Current Density in Alkaline Electrolyzers
summary: The development of simple and scalable fabrication strategies for cost-effective electrodes is crucial to advance water splitting in alkaline water electrolyzers (AWEs). Here, we present a coating-annealing method to conformally coat a MoSx catalyst layer onto a porous Ni foam (NF) substrate. By controlling the annealing process, the composition of the MoSx layer could be tuned from MoS2 to MoS3 and its catalytic performance for hydrogen evolution reaction (HER) in alkaline media was optimized. The MoS3@NF synthesized by this method achieved industrially relevant HER current densities of 200 mA/cm2 at a low overpotential of 246 mV, maintaining stable operation for over 240 h. The MoS3@NF cathode, combined with a stainless steel anode, enabled an alkaline water electrolyzer (AWE) cell to operate steadily at 1.96 V and 1 A/cm2 for 1000 h. This performance surpasses that of most of the previously reported water electrolyzers employing MoSx-based cathodes. Our work demonstrates the potential of MoS3 (with its abundant edge-sulfur atoms serving as active sites) as a high-performance cathode material for industrial AWEs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种涂层-退火方法，在泡沫镍上制备MoSx催化层，通过调控退火过程优化MoS3成分，在碱性电解水中实现优异HER性能和长达1000小时的稳定运行。
AI.motivation: 开发简单、可规模化、低成本的电极制备策略，以推动碱性水电解器中水分解技术的发展。
AI.method: 采用涂层-退火方法将MoSx催化剂层共形涂覆于多孔泡沫镍基底上，通过控制退火过程调控MoSx组分（从MoS2到MoS3），优化碱性HER催化性能。
AI.result: MoS3@NF在246 mV低过电位下实现200 mA/cm²工业级HER电流密度，稳定运行超240小时；组装的AWE电池在1.96 V、1 A/cm²条件下稳定运行1000小时，性能优于多数已报道的MoSx基电解器。
AI.conclusion: MoS3因其丰富的边缘硫原子作为活性位点，是一种极具潜力的高性能工业AWE阴极材料。

title: All-electric picosecond field-free spin-orbit torque switching in magnetic trilayers
summary: Spin-orbit torque (SOT) enables the electrical manipulation of the magnetization with high speed and low energy consumption for magnetic random-access memory (MRAM) applications. Previous studies of short-pulse SOT switching have mainly focused on the nanosecond regime, whereas reports employing picosecond pulses remain scarce and have largely relied on field-assisted switching using bulky, high-power laser systems, limiting prospects for chip-level integration. Here, we introduce an all-electrical on-chip nanoplasma pulse generator capable of producing pulses as short as 6.4 ps, enabling ultrafast picosecond field-free SOT switching in magnetic trilayers. We show that reducing the pulse width lowers the writing energy by 2-3 orders of magnitude, with ultrafast Joule heating assistance playing an essential role in the enhanced efficiency of the picosecond regime. Our demonstration of ultrafast, all-electrical, and field-free SOT switching establishes the nanoplasma pulse generator as an on-chip platform for ultrafast spintronic studies, with promise for high-speed, energy-efficient, and scalable SOT-MRAM technologies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种全电学片上纳米等离子体脉冲发生器，可产生短至6.4 ps的脉冲，实现了磁三层结构中超快皮秒级无场自旋轨道矩（SOT）翻转，将写入能量降低了2-3个数量级，为高速、低功耗、可扩展的SOT-MRAM技术提供了片上平台。
AI.motivation: 现有SOT翻转研究主要聚焦于纳秒级短脉冲，皮秒级脉冲研究稀少且依赖大功率激光系统的场辅助翻转，限制了芯片级集成。因此，需要开发全电学、片上集成的皮秒级脉冲源，以实现超快、低能耗的SOT翻转。
AI.method: 设计并制备了全电学片上纳米等离子体脉冲发生器，可产生短至6.4 ps的脉冲；将该脉冲发生器集成到磁三层结构中，实现无场辅助的皮秒级SOT翻转；通过改变脉冲宽度，研究写入能量与脉冲宽度的关系。
AI.result: 成功实现了6.4 ps超短脉冲下的无场SOT翻转；减小脉冲宽度可将写入能量降低2-3个数量级；超快焦耳热辅助在皮秒级效率提升中起关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 该工作确立了纳米等离子体脉冲发生器作为片上平台用于超快自旋电子学研究的可行性，为高速、节能、可扩展的SOT-MRAM技术开辟了新路径。

title: Tracking atomic-scale interdiffusion in immiscible bimetallic nanoparticles via four-dimensional electron tomography
summary: The interdiffusion of immiscible elements is generally considered both thermodynamically unfavorable and kinetically hindered. At the nanoscale, however, the mixing behavior of multielements materials often diverges from bulk equilibrium, yet a quantitative, atomically resolved description of this transformation has remained challenging. Using ex situ four dimensional atomic resolution electron tomography combined with in situ scanning transmission electron microscopy, here we reveal the atomic scale miscible transition driven by interdiffusion in immiscible PdIr nanoparticles at temperatures far below the melting point. The pathway involves surface reconstruction atom hopping at 200oC and surface flattening at 300oC, followed by a critical transition at 400oC where Ir interfacial diffusion and discrete Ir intermediates drive miscible intermixing. Upon reaching the nanoscale melting point 900oC, collective inward Ir diffusion yields the thermodynamically stable IrPd configuration. Our findings provide quantitative atomic scale insights into how metastable nanostructures evolve through distinct intermediates, offering a design framework for advanced multielement materials.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过原子分辨率电子断层扫描和原位扫描透射电镜，揭示了不相溶的PdIr纳米颗粒在远低于熔点的温度下，通过表面重构、原子跳跃、界面扩散等中间步骤实现原子尺度互溶转变的微观机制。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为不相溶元素间的互扩散在热力学和动力学上都受到阻碍，但在纳米尺度下多元素材料的混合行为常偏离平衡态，缺乏定量的原子级分辨率描述。
AI.method: 采用离位四维原子分辨率电子断层扫描（4D atomic resolution electron tomography）结合原位扫描透射电子显微镜（in situ STEM），对不相溶的PdIr纳米颗粒进行原子尺度表征。
AI.result: 揭示了多步转变路径：200°C表面重构和原子跳跃→300°C表面平坦化→400°C临界转变（Ir界面扩散和离散Ir中间体导致互溶混合）→900°C（纳米尺度熔点）集体向内Ir扩散形成热力学稳定的IrPd构型。
AI.conclusion: 研究提供了亚稳态纳米结构通过不同中间体演化的定量原子尺度见解，为先进多元素材料的设计提供了框架。

title: Quantum dynamic simulation of triplet formation in an effective model of Y6 (BTP-4F)
summary:
We construct a five-state model for photoexcitation in Y6 (BTP-4F) dimers, and then solve the non-adiabtic dynamics using the Hierarchical Equations of Motion (HEOM) method. We find that triplets are populated mainly via a transiently excited \textit{intermolecular} charge-transfer singlet to triplet Frenkel exciton route; this route is not available to the monomer. Analysis of one-particle transition density matrices suggests that the charge-transfer states are spatially distinct to the Frenkel exciton states, indicating that the large spin-orbit-coupling for this transition is due to it being permitted by an associated change in orbital character.
  Aggregation in Y6 therefore directly enables fast and high-yield intersystem crossing. We selenise our model dimers, significantly enhancing spin-orbit-coupling, which then accelerates this charge-transfer mediated route. Looking forwards to simulations on larger aggregates, we show that, though Marcus theory gives qualitatively correct dynamics, the long-time yields are incorrect due to it missing quantum recurrences. Instead, we show that the recently developed memory-kernel projector\cite{Gestsson2025-ez} method can produce semi-classical rates directly from the HEOM equations which lead to quantitatively correct dynamics and yields.

AI.tldr: 本文通过构建Y6二聚体的五态模型并利用HEOM方法求解非绝热动力学，发现三重态主要通过分子间电荷转移单重态到三重态Frenkel激子的路径产生，聚合作用直接促进了快速高效的系间窜越。研究还表明，传统Marcus理论在长时间产率上存在偏差，而记忆核投影方法可从HEOM方程导出半经典速率，实现定量正确的动力学与产率预测。
AI.motivation: 理解Y6分子聚合后如何实现高效的系间窜越（ISC），揭示三重态生成的微观机制，并寻找能够准确描述该过程的动力学方法。
AI.method: 构建Y6二聚体的五态模型，采用分层运动方程（HEOM）方法求解非绝热动力学，并通过单粒子跃迁密度矩阵分析态的空间特征。同时对比了Marcus理论、HEOM直接模拟以及记忆核投影方法的表现。
AI.result: 1. 三重态主要通过瞬态激发的分子间电荷转移单重态→三重态Frenkel激子路径生成，该路径在单体中不存在；2. 电荷转移态与Frenkel激子态空间分离，轨道特征变化导致大自旋-轨道耦合；3. 硒取代可增强自旋-轨道耦合，加速该路径；4. Marcus理论定性正确但长时间产率不准，记忆核投影方法可给出定量正确的结果。
AI.conclusion: Y6的聚合直接促进了快速高效的系间窜越，其机制为分子间电荷转移介导的路径。记忆核投影方法能从HEOM中提取半经典速率，为更大聚集体的模拟提供可行方案。

title: Thermodynamically consistent phase field model for hydrogen-assisted cracking
summary: We propose a phase field model able to simulate hydrogen-assisted cracking in polycrystalline materials. Within a variational framework, the model simultaneously describes crack propagation and hydrogen segregation on crack surfaces and grain boundaries together with the associated reduction in interfacial energies. In the context of hydrogen-enhanced decohesion (HEDE) mechanisms, we demonstrate the ability of the model to capture the transition from transgranular cracking to hydrogen-assisted intergranular cracking.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个能模拟多晶材料中氢致裂纹的相场模型，该模型在变分框架下同时描述了裂纹扩展、氢在裂纹表面和晶界的偏析，以及相应的界面能降低，并能捕捉从穿晶断裂到氢辅助沿晶断裂的转变。
AI.motivation: 多晶材料中氢致开裂（如氢致沿晶断裂）的微观机制尚不明确，现有模型难以同时描述裂纹扩展、氢偏析和界面能变化，因此需要建立一个统一的相场模型来模拟这一复杂过程。
AI.method: 采用相场法，在变分框架下将裂纹扩展与氢在裂纹表面和晶界的偏析耦合建模，并通过降低界面能来表征氢增强脱聚（HEDE）机制。
AI.result: 模型成功模拟了从穿晶断裂到氢辅助沿晶断裂的转变，验证了其捕捉HEDE机制下氢致裂纹路径变化的能力。
AI.conclusion: 该相场模型能够有效模拟多晶材料中氢致裂纹的扩展与路径转变，为理解氢增强脱聚（HEDE）机制提供了有力的计算工具。

title: Plasmonic properties and correlation energies from a compact multipole representation of the dielectric response in 2D metals
summary: Multipole-Padé approximants provide a compact representation of dynamical response functions in terms of a small number of collective modes. Here, we generalize this framework to incorporate momentum dependence across the full Brillouin zone of 2D metals by constructing a symmetry-conserving, anisotropic representation of the inverse dielectric function. This analytic form enables efficient and accurate evaluation of quantities involving dynamical screening, including spectral features and correlation energies. We construct such compact representations for a set of seven two dimensional metals spanning distinct electronic regimes, and show that a small number of dispersive plasmonic modes suffices to accurately describe the dielectric response across the full Brillouin zone, while also yielding accurate correlation energies. The proposed representation therefore establishes a direct bridge between {\it ab initio} calculations and analytical models of screening, opening new avenues for applications in condensed matter systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出多极-帕德近似框架，通过对称性保持的各向异性表示，在2D金属整个布里渊区用少量等离激元模式精确描述介电响应，构建了第一性原理计算与解析筛选模型之间的桥梁。
AI.motivation: 现有的多极-帕德近似仅适用于频率依赖，缺乏动量依赖的描述能力。作者希望将该框架推广到包含全布里渊区动量依赖，从而更高效准确地计算动态屏蔽相关量。
AI.method: 构建对称性保持的各向异性逆介电函数表示，用少量色散等离激元模式覆盖整个布里渊区，并在七种不同电子态的2D金属上进行验证。
AI.result: 少量色散等离激元模式就能准确描述整个布里渊区的介电响应，并给出精确的相关能量。
AI.conclusion: 该表示法建立了第一性原理计算与解析筛选模型之间的直接桥梁，为凝聚态系统应用开辟新途径。

title: Effect of polar distortions on the anomalous Hall conductivity of altermagnetic $α$-MnTe
summary: Altermagnetic $α$-MnTe with Néel vector along the $y$-axis exhibits a finite anomalous Hall conductivity (AHC) and weak ferromagnetism along the $z$-axis. As already demonstrated in the bulk, there is the breaking of the C$_6$ symmetry by the in-plane Néel vector, leaving a C$_2$-type magnetic symmetry. The surface of $α$-MnTe breaks the C$_2$, leaving only a time-reversed mirror symmetry with respect to the $x=0$ plane. Therefore, we demonstrate that on the surface, the interplay between breaking of the crystal symmetry and Néel vector orientation produces a reduction of the space group from hexagonal P6$_3$/mmc to orthorhombic Amm2. As a result, the surface exhibits not only a polar distortion along the $z$-axis, but also a polar distortion and a weak ferrimagnetism along the $y$-axis. To describe the surface of MnTe in an accessible way, we simplify the problem and examine the effect of the in-plane electric field in bulk MnTe. Moreover, as a doped ionic semiconductor, the properties of MnTe can be influenced by lattice polarization under an applied electric field. We investigate the interplay between the intrinsic anomalous Hall effect and lattice polarization, showing that polarization effects can substantially affect the AHC. Since the electric field breaks inversion symmetry, this contribution from the lattice polarization coexists with the non-linear anomalous Hall effect, highlighting the rich transport phenomenology of altermagnets.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了α-MnTe表面由于对称性破缺导致的晶体结构从六方降为正交，以及由此产生的极性畸变、弱铁磁性和反常霍尔电导。还探讨了晶格极化对反常霍尔效应的影响，揭示了交变磁体中丰富的输运现象。
AI.motivation: 理解α-MnTe表面因Néel矢量取向和晶体对称性破缺导致的物理性质变化，以及晶格极化与反常霍尔效应的相互作用。
AI.method: 通过对称性分析研究表面空间群变化，并用体相外加面内电场简化模拟表面效应，分析极化对反常霍尔电导的影响。
AI.result: 表面空间群从六方P6₃/mmc降为正交Amm2，导致沿z轴和y轴的极性畸变及沿y轴的弱铁磁性；晶格极化可显著影响反常霍尔电导。
AI.conclusion: 交变磁体表面存在丰富的对称性破缺现象，极化效应与非线性反常霍尔效应共存，为输运现象研究提供了新视角。
